      function_analyses:
      - analysis_id: XY-FA-001
        seat: XY
        y_atomic_subclaim_ref: Y2-ASC-001
        input_pair_ids:
        - XY-CS-Y-004
        - XY-CS-Y-008
        - XY-CS-X-002
        - XY-CS-X-011
        compared_content: Compared the Y claim with the listed X and Y content-source pairs.
        relation_operation: Compared Y's global AI-focused versus total Data Center demand distinction with X's firm- and site-level AI announcements.
        result: X confirms that some projects are explicitly AI-related, but X does not measure the global AI share of total Data Center growth.
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        interpretation_added_by_2d: The 2d judgment limits corroboration to observed firm and project examples.
        boundary_preserved: Global aggregate, firm, project, and site scopes remain separate.
      - analysis_id: XY-FA-002
        seat: XY
        y_atomic_subclaim_ref: Y2-ASC-002
        input_pair_ids:
        - XY-CS-Y-005
        - XY-CS-Y-004
        - XY-CS-X-005
        - XY-CS-X-011
        - XY-CS-X-022
        compared_content: Compared the Y claim with the listed X and Y content-source pairs.
        relation_operation: Compared model-based AI attribution with X's direct regulatory, announced-capacity, and regional-water observations.
        result: Both inputs support a strict separation between direct measurement and model or announced values.
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        interpretation_added_by_2d: The 2d judgment identifies a measurement-category relation without estimating AI consumption.
        boundary_preserved: Metered load, IT capacity, interconnection boundary, regional withdrawal, and model output remain distinct.
      - analysis_id: XY-FA-003
        seat: XY
        y_atomic_subclaim_ref: Y2-ASC-003
        input_pair_ids:
        - XY-CS-Y-004
        - XY-CS-Y-010
        - XY-CS-X-010
        - XY-CS-X-011
        compared_content: Compared the Y claim with the listed X and Y content-source pairs.
        relation_operation: Compared Y's AI-facility capacity-growth candidate with X's versioned Meta site announcements.
        result: X directly observes a larger later AI-site announcement, but not completed or operating capacity growth.
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        interpretation_added_by_2d: The 2d judgment treats versioned announcements as evidence of announced expansion only.
        boundary_preserved: Announcement date, site scope, and IT-capacity boundary are preserved.
      - analysis_id: XY-FA-004
        seat: XY
        y_atomic_subclaim_ref: Y2-ASC-004
        input_pair_ids:
        - XY-CS-Y-004
        compared_content: Compared the Y claim with the listed X and Y content-source pairs.
        relation_operation: Checked Y's efficiency-versus-aggregate-demand feedback candidate against X's evidence surface.
        result: X contains no per-task efficiency, adoption-elasticity, or rebound measurement.
        state: UNKNOWN
        interpretation_added_by_2d: The 2d judgment records absence of cross-input corroboration without treating it as refutation.
        boundary_preserved: Y's analytical source boundary is retained.
      - analysis_id: XY-FA-005

        y_atomic_subclaim_ref: Y2-ASC-005
        input_pair_ids:

        relation_operation: Compared Y's non-AI digital-service alternative cause with X's business, customer, cloud, and AI demand language.
        result: X supports the existence of broader demand categories, but does not quantify their shares.
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        interpretation_added_by_2d: The 2d judgment identifies coexisting demand narratives rather than allocating causation.
        boundary_preserved: Firm narrative and national or state aggregate remain separate.

      function_cells:
      - cell_id: XY-FC-001
        seat: XY
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XY-CS-Y-004
          - XY-CS-Y-008
          - XY-CS-X-002
          - XY-CS-X-011
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - content: The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation,
            storage, efficiency, and future pathways.
          source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
        - content: The 2024 LBNL report estimates U.S. Data Center energy, water, and carbon outcomes and treats cryptocurrency electricity in a separate
            chapter.
          source_url: https://escholarship.org/uc/item/32d6m0d1
        - content: Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through
            2035, and up to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
        - content: Louisiana Economic Development later announced that Meta Hyperion had expanded to more than 50 billion dollars, nearly 10 million square
            feet, and 5 GW of IT capacity, and described it as Meta's largest AI training cluster.
          source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XY-FA-001
          operation: Compared Y's global AI-focused versus total Data Center demand distinction with X's firm- and site-level AI announcements.
          relation_found: Explicit AI attribution exists for selected projects.
          relation_not_found: A global causal share or complete non-AI baseline is not observed in X.
          conditions: Use as a scoped relation, not a universal attribution.
          limits: Workload-level meters and comprehensive global statistics are absent.
        output_statement:
          statement: Selected AI-linked projects are directly observed, while the claim about AI's share of total Data Center growth remains conditional.
          source_supported: PARTIAL
          interpretation_added: Scope comparison only.
      - cell_id: XY-FC-002
        seat: XY
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XY-CS-Y-005
          - XY-CS-Y-004
          - XY-CS-X-005
          - XY-CS-X-011
          - XY-CS-X-022
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - content: LBNL presents U.S. Data Center electricity-use scenarios to 2030 whose results vary with AI-chip quantity, lifetime, idle power, and
            utilization assumptions.
          source_url: https://eta.lbl.gov/publications/united-states-data-center-energy-2025
        - content: The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation,
            storage, efficiency, and future pathways.
          source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
        - content: FERC rejected the proposed amendment that would have increased the Susquehanna co-located load boundary from 300 MW to 480 MW; the order
            discusses deliverability violations and additional upgrades above the baseline.
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
        - content: Louisiana Economic Development later announced that Meta Hyperion had expanded to more than 50 billion dollars, nearly 10 million square
            feet, and 5 GW of IT capacity, and described it as Meta's largest AI training cluster.
          source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
        - content: AWS reported 263,169,407 gallons of water withdrawn by direct operations in Virginia during 2025.
          source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/aws-sustainability-fact-sheets/aws-fact-sheet-virginia.pdf
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XY-FA-002
          operation: Compared model-based AI attribution with X's direct regulatory, announced-capacity, and regional-water observations.
          relation_found: Measurement and model categories are non-equivalent.
          relation_not_found: No workload-level AI meter is present.
          conditions: Verified only as a boundary relation.
          limits: No quantitative AI causal effect is produced.
        output_statement:
          statement: Model estimates, announced capacity, and direct measurements must remain separate.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: Category separation.

        - content: Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment,

          source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
        - content: Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and
            Europe during 2026–2030; the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.

        function_processing:

        - content: Amazon reported AWS global WUE of 0.15 L/kWh for 2024, a time series from 2021 through 2024, a 946-million-liter reduction in North American
            cooling-water needs, and integrated liquid cooling for AI workloads.

        - content: AWS reported 263,169,407 gallons of water withdrawn by direct operations in Virginia during 2025.

        function_processing:

            dollars, about 4 million square feet, and about 2,250 acres.
          source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
        - content: Louisiana Economic Development later announced that Meta Hyperion had expanded to more than 50 billion dollars, nearly 10 million square

      - cell_id: XY-FC-024
        seat: XY
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XY-CS-Y-004
          - XY-CS-Y-013
          - XY-CS-Y-014
          - XY-CS-X-002
          - XY-CS-X-004
          - XY-CS-X-012
          - XY-CS-X-013
          - XY-CS-X-015
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - content: The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation,
            storage, efficiency, and future pathways.
          source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
        - content: Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500
            MW.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
        - content: Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
          source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
        - content: Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through
            2035, and up to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
        - content: Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment,
            and exploration of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
          source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
        - content: Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and
            Europe during 2026–2030; the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.
          source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
        - content: Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the
            difficulty and uncertainty of commercial fusion.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
        - content: Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XY-FA-024
          operation: Compared the multi-technology procurement candidate with renewable, fission, SMR, and fusion agreements.
          relation_found: Multiple energy technologies and contracts are directly documented.
          relation_not_found: Commercial delivery and comparative effectiveness are not established.
          conditions: Do not treat all technologies as equivalent or operating.
          limits: Prices, additionality, and delivered outcomes are absent.
        output_statement:
          statement: Technology-sector buyers are pursuing multiple energy technologies simultaneously.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: Portfolio relation.

          source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero

            subject to regulatory, state, and local approvals.
          source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
        - content: Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and

        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XY-FA-025
          operation: Compared the multiple-driver technology-selection candidate with source narratives about AI, business demand, climate goals, reliability,

          relation_found: Multiple stated drivers coexist.
          relation_not_found: Necessary, sufficient, and quantitative causal contributions are not established.

          limits: Internal decision weights and matched counterfactuals are absent.
        output_statement:

          interpretation_added: Competing-explanations synthesis.

        - content: Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and

          statement: Efficiency-driven aggregate rebound is not verified by the current XY inputs.
          source_supported: false
          interpretation_added: Cross-input absence classification.
      - cell_id: XY-FC-043
        seat: XY
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:

          - XY-CS-X-013
          - XY-CS-X-015
          - XY-CS-X-016
          - XY-CS-X-017
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - content: PJM's working material distinguishes firm and non-firm requests and applies assumptions for ramp time, utilization, and national constraints
            when converting requests into forecast contributions.
          source_url: https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf
        - content: Constellation's announcement connects a 20-year Microsoft PPA with the planned restart of the approximately 835 MW Crane plant for a
            2028 target.
          source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
        - content: Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500
            MW.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
        - content: Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
          source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
        - content: Helion announced a Microsoft fusion PPA for a 2028 target and at least 50 MW after ramp-up.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
        - content: CFS announced a Google 200 MW ARC PPA, an early-2030s target, and additional investment.
          source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
        - content: The U.S. DOE fusion strategy describes a private-sector-led pilot pathway in the 2030s, science and technology gaps, public-private partnerships,
            supply chains, national strategy, capital, and AI-enabled research.
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
        - content: Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through
            2035, and up to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
        - content: FERC rejected the proposed amendment that would have increased the Susquehanna co-located load boundary from 300 MW to 480 MW; the order
            discusses deliverability violations and additional upgrades above the baseline.
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
        - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Microsoft PPA and a plan to restart the approximately 835 MW Crane Clean Energy Center for a 2028 target,
            subject to regulatory, state, and local approvals.
          source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
        - content: The NRC status page records that the reactor permanently ceased operation in 2019 and that restart-related licensing actions and facility
            restoration remain under review.
          source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/info-finder/reactors/ccec
        - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Meta PPA for 1,121 MW of existing nuclear generation beginning in June 2027 and a planned roughly 30
            MW uprate.
          source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2025/constellation-meta-sign-20-year-deal-for-clean-reliable-nuclear-energy-in-illinois.html
        - content: The NRC records Clinton Unit 1 as operating and records a license-renewal decision dated 2025-12-16.
          source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/reactors/operating/licensing/renewal/applications/clinton
        - content: Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the
            difficulty and uncertainty of commercial fusion.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
        - content: Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
        - content: Helion announced that initial earthwork and facility construction had begun at the Malaga site and repeated the plan to provide at least
            50 MW to Microsoft.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
        - content: Helion announced receipt of a conditional-use permit and advancement to the next construction phase, while repeating the Microsoft PPA
            and 2028 target.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XY-FA-043
          operation: Compared lifecycle-state separation across regulatory, corporate, construction, and policy sources.
          relation_found: Multiple distinct lifecycle states are directly observed.
          relation_not_found: No source supports automatic promotion from one state to the next.
          conditions: Preserve every gate independently.
          limits: Most future projects lack actual commercial milestones.
        output_statement:
          statement: Project lifecycle states must remain separate; no earlier state proves a later state.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: Cross-source lifecycle verification.

      - inherited_pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
        function_surface: XZ
        originating_data_seat: X
        source_use_state: USED_IN_FUNCTION
        content:
          preserved_content: 2025년에 12 GW를 초과하는 Net-new Clean Energy 계약을 체결했다고 보고함. 해당 수치는 PPA·Storage·Energy Attributes를 포함하고 실제 발전량은 달라질 수 있다고 각주로 경계를
            명시함. 2025년 Freshwater Consumption의 약 78%에 해당하는 77억 gallon을 Replenish했다고 보고함.
          content_type: DIRECT_FACT
          input_claim_ids:
          - DF-012
        web_source:
          source_title: Google 2026 Environmental Report
          publisher_or_author: Google

          preserved_content: 2021년 Global Data Center Fleet가 43억 gallon을 소비했고 평균 Google Data Center가 일일 약 450,000 gallon을 소비한다고 보고함. 일부 Campus에서 Reclaimed/Non-potable
            Water를 사용하며 Douglas County Georgia에서는 Municipal Wastewater를 재활용한다고 설명함.

        compared_content: Google–Kairos의 최대 500 MW 계약 및 AI 전력수요 언급과 NIS/TIS·Clean Energy system framework
        relation_operation: named actor·contract·technology relation을 innovation-system 구조와 대조
        result: 기업·프로젝트·계약 주체는 시스템 객체로 배치할 수 있으나, AI가 계약의 단일 원인이라는 인과 Fit은 입력으로 검증되지 않는다.
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        interpretation_added_by_2d: true
        boundary_preserved: 계약 발표와 innovation-system 구조를 연결하되 causal effect와 commercial operation을 분리

        - XZ-CSP-Z-S-020
        compared_content: Hermes 2 50 MW PPA·TVA Grid·Google Data Center attribute matching과 large-load/grid relation
        relation_operation: PPA·grid supply·attribute matching·site load 경계를 분리
        result: 50 MW 계약·계획은 grid/contract topology로 설명되지만 두 Data Center의 site별 실측부하나 전용 물리전력량으로 Fit되지 않는다.
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        interpretation_added_by_2d: true
        boundary_preserved: PPA quantity와 physical delivery·site metered load를 분리

        relation_operation: 서로 다른 프로젝트 상태를 기술성숙도·채택준비·에너지 옵션 층으로 분해
        result: 개발계약·투자·검토는 동일 stage가 아니며 단일 TRL 또는 상용화 판정으로 합칠 수 없다.

        relation_operation: 규제상 baseline·proposed increment·approval state를 grid interconnection layer에 대응
        result: Z의 large-load framework는 X의 interconnection·reliability boundary를 직접 설명한다. 다만 실제 metered demand나 dynamic risk magnitude는 제공하지 않는다.
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION

      function_cells:
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-001
        seat: XZ
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-001
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-012
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-013
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-020
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-001
          content: Google은 Kairos의 복수 SMR에서 전력을 구매하는 계약을 발표했고, 첫 배치를 2030년, 추가 배치를 2035년까지 목표로 하며 총 최대 500 MW를 미국 전력망에 공급한다고 명시함. AI 기술을 지원할 신규 전력 필요를 직접
            언급함.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-012
          content: 'NIS, interactive linkages, governance, coordination; boundary: 일반 혁신시스템; Fusion 전용 인과모형 아님; linked models: ZM-IN-001, ZM-IN-003'
          source_url: https://www.oecd.org/content/dam/oecd/en/publications/reports/2005/08/governance-of-innovation-systems_g1gh5aee/9789264011038-en.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-013
          content: 'TIS 기능·Actor·interaction; boundary: 사례가 ammonia/industrial load; Fusion·Data Center에는 구조적 전용 필요; linked models: ZM-IN-002, ZM-IN-003'
          source_url: https://www.nrel.gov/docs/fy23osti/84469.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-020
          content: 'Generation·storage·grid·efficiency·demand resources; boundary: 옵션 목록; 특정 조합의 경제성 보증 아님; linked models: NO_MODEL_LINK_DECLARED_IN_INPUT'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/oe/clean-energy-resources-meet-data-center-electricity-demand
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-001
          operation: named actor·contract·technology relation을 innovation-system 구조와 대조
          relation_found: actor·contract·technology의 구조적 관계
          relation_not_found: AI 수요의 단일·결정적 원인성
          conditions:
          - 계약 존재와 AI 언급은 X source 범위에서만 사용
          - NIS/TIS는 actor mapping framework로만 적용
          limits:
          - 운영출력·site load·causal effect 자료 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Google–Kairos 사례는 actor·contract·technology 구조에 배치 가능하지만 AI 원인성과 운영성과는 OPEN_FUTURE다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-002
        seat: XZ
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-020
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002
          content: Kairos–TVA PPA에 따라 Hermes 2의 50 MW가 TVA Grid에 공급될 예정이며 Google은 TVA를 통해 Tennessee Montgomery County와 Alabama Jackson County Data Center
            수요에 대응하는 Clean Energy Attributes를 조달한다고 발표함. 목표시점은 2030년임.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-first-advanced-nuclear-reactor-project-with-kairos-power-and-tennessee-valley-authority/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          content: '대규모 Data Center load·BPS·backup transfer risk; boundary: 북미 BPS 중심; 개별 계통연계 study를 대체하지 않음; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
          content: 'Large load study·tariff·co-location policy layer; boundary: 미국 연방관할·진행 중 절차; 보편 Grid rule 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-020

          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/oe/clean-energy-resources-meet-data-center-electricity-demand
        function_processing:

          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-003
        seat: XZ
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-003
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-014
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-015
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-016
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-020
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-003
          content: Washington에서 초기 4기 약 320 MW와 향후 최대 960 MW 옵션을 포함한 개발계약, X-energy 투자, Virginia North Anna 부지의 최소 300 MW SMR 검토를 발표함. Amazon은 운영과 고객수요의
            증가를 직접 언급함.
          source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
          content: 'Fusion RDD&D·ARL·ecosystem·risk layers; boundary: 목표·전략이며 성취사실 또는 확정일정 아님; linked models: ZM-TR-003, ZM-IN-003, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-014
          content: 'TRL 1–9, particular technology maturity; boundary: NASA environment 정의를 타 기관에 무수정 적용 불가; linked models: ZM-TR-001'
          source_url: https://www.nasa.gov/directorates/somd/space-communications-navigation-program/technology-readiness-levels/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-015
          content: 'TRA/TMP, capital-asset project tailoring; boundary: Program-specific guide가 우선할 수 있음; 과학원리 연구에는 부적합할 수 있음; linked models: ZM-TR-002'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/documents/technology-readiness-assessment-guide
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-016
          content: '비기술적 adoption risk·commercialization; boundary: 기술성능 또는 시장성공을 단독 증명하지 않음; linked models: ZM-TR-003, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/technologycommercialization/adoption-readiness-levels-arl-framework
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-020
          content: 'Generation·storage·grid·efficiency·demand resources; boundary: 옵션 목록; 특정 조합의 경제성 보증 아님; linked models: NO_MODEL_LINK_DECLARED_IN_INPUT'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/oe/clean-energy-resources-meet-data-center-electricity-demand
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-003
          operation: 서로 다른 프로젝트 상태를 기술성숙도·채택준비·에너지 옵션 층으로 분해
          relation_found: 다중 프로젝트의 상태 분해
          relation_not_found: 전체 Amazon nuclear portfolio의 단일 TRL·운영 Fit
          conditions:
          - 각 프로젝트별 assessment unit 필요
          - AI causal link가 X에서 명시되지 않은 경계 유지
          limits:
          - component test·authorized assessment·site allocation 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Amazon 원자력 포트폴리오는 복수 stage의 actor·project 집합이며 단일 기술성숙도나 AI 원인으로 판정할 수 없다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-004
        seat: XZ
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
          content: 기존 공동입지 부하 300 MW를 480 MW로 늘리기 위한 개정 ISA 제안을 FERC가 거부함. 480 MW 초과 시 Generation Deliverability Violations와 추가 Upgrade 필요성이 문서에 제시됨.
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          content: '대규모 Data Center load·BPS·backup transfer risk; boundary: 북미 BPS 중심; 개별 계통연계 study를 대체하지 않음; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
          content: 'Large load study·tariff·co-location policy layer; boundary: 미국 연방관할·진행 중 절차; 보편 Grid rule 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-004
          operation: 규제상 baseline·proposed increment·approval state를 grid interconnection layer에 대응
          relation_found: 300 MW baseline과 거부된 480 MW increment의 category relation
          relation_not_found: 실제 부하와 site-specific reliability effect
          conditions:
          - 480 MW를 승인값으로 사용하지 않음
          - 거부가 300 MW baseline 삭제를 뜻하지 않음
          limits:
          - metered demand·dynamic model·protection data 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Susquehanna 사례는 large-load interconnection framework에 부합하며 480 MW는 승인된 부하로 승격될 수 없다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-005
        seat: XZ
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-005
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-006
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-021
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-022
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-005
          content: Microsoft와 20년 PPA를 체결하고 약 835 MW 원전을 재가동하여 PJM 지역 Microsoft Data Center 전력사용을 상쇄하는 계획을 발표함. 목표운전시점은 2028년이며 규제·주·지방 승인이 필요하다고 명시함.
          source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-006
          content: 원자로는 2019-09-26 영구운전정지 후 재가동 가능성이 검토되고 있으며, 재가동에는 NRC 승인과 설비 복구·Upgrade가 필요하고 복수 Licensing Action이 심사 중임.
          source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/info-finder/reactors/ccec
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-021
          content: 'CD-0 through CD-4 and Closeout; boundary: DOE capital asset governance; technology TRL과 다름; linked models: ZM-SG-001, ZM-PR-001'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/prod/files/PARS_II_SOP_Version_1.1_2011_08_11.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-022
          content: 'Technical reviews, entrance/exit criteria, KDP; boundary: NASA program/project context; Fusion에는 Analogical; linked models: ZM-SG-002,
            ZM-PR-001'
          source_url: https://www.nasa.gov/reference/3-0-nasa-program-project-life-cycle/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
          content: 'Emerging U.S. Fusion licensing·oversight actor; boundary: 미국 관할; 설계·연료·Site별 적용은 별도; linked models: ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/materials/fusion/vision-strategy
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-005
          operation: 계약·목표·심사·운영 stage를 별도 clock과 authority로 대조
          relation_found: 계약·규제심사·운영 stage의 시간적 분리
          relation_not_found: 2028 운전 달성 및 Data Center 공급 성과
          conditions:
          - NRC 상태가 규제·운영 판단의 우선 boundary
          - agency-specific gate를 공식 프로젝트 gate로 오인하지 않음
          limits:
          - 승인완료·commissioning·운영 meter 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Crane은 계약·목표와 재가동 심사가 병존하는 조건부 프로젝트이며 현재 운영으로 판정할 수 없다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-006
        seat: XZ
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-007
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-008
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-021
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-007
          content: Meta와 20년 PPA를 발표했으며 계약대상은 1,121 MW의 배출없는 원자력 에너지이고 시작시점은 2027년 6월로 제시됨. 약 30 MW Uprate와 장기운영 지원도 발표됨.
          source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2025/constellation-meta-sign-20-year-deal-for-clean-reliable-nuclear-energy-in-illinois.html
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-008
          content: NRC는 Clinton의 운영·면허갱신 자료를 공개하고 2025-12-16 갱신결정을 기록함.
          source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/reactors/operating/licensing/renewal/applications/clinton
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          content: '대규모 Data Center load·BPS·backup transfer risk; boundary: 북미 BPS 중심; 개별 계통연계 study를 대체하지 않음; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
          content: 'Large load study·tariff·co-location policy layer; boundary: 미국 연방관할·진행 중 절차; 보편 Grid rule 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-021
          content: 'CD-0 through CD-4 and Closeout; boundary: DOE capital asset governance; technology TRL과 다름; linked models: ZM-SG-001, ZM-PR-001'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/prod/files/PARS_II_SOP_Version_1.1_2011_08_11.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
          content: 'Emerging U.S. Fusion licensing·oversight actor; boundary: 미국 관할; 설계·연료·Site별 적용은 별도; linked models: ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/materials/fusion/vision-strategy
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-006
          operation: 운영 plant state와 미래 contract start를 grid·regulatory·project gate로 분리
          relation_found: plant state와 future contract state의 동시 보존
          relation_not_found: 특정 Meta Data Center로의 물리적 전달량
          conditions:
          - 운영 상태는 NRC source 범위
          - 1,121 MW 계약 reference를 site load로 변환하지 않음
          limits:
          - site allocation·power flow·hourly matching 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Clinton은 운영 중인 발전소이지만 Meta PPA의 개시와 특정 Data Center 전달은 별도 검증 대상이다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-007
        seat: XZ
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-009
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-003
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-009
          content: Meta의 AI-optimized Data Center를 Richland Parish에 선정했으며 초기 발표는 약 100억 달러, 약 400만 ft², 약 2,250 acre의 Site 규모를 제시함. Entergy와 전력계획을 협의하고
            전력사용을 100% Clean/Renewable Energy로 Match한다는 목표를 발표함.
          source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
          content: 투자규모를 500억 달러 이상, 건물면적을 약 1,000만 ft², IT capacity를 5 GW로 확대했다고 발표하고 Hyperion을 Meta 최대 AI Training Cluster로 직접 귀속함.
          source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
          content: 'PUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Standard 전문 세부는 라이선스 경계; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/30134-2
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-003
          content: 'IT·air·cooling·electrical·heat recovery·metering; boundary: 설계지침; 개별 Site 실측치 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-EN-002'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-07/best-practice-guide-data-center-design_0.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
          content: 'Bottom-up IT, PUE/WUE, cooling, grid carbon/water intensity; boundary: 미국 aggregate estimate·scenario; 개별 Site 인과증거 아님; linked models:
            ZM-EN-002, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://eta-publications.lbl.gov/sites/default/files/2024-12/lbnl-2024-united-states-data-center-energy-usage-report_1.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          content: '대규모 Data Center load·BPS·backup transfer risk; boundary: 북미 BPS 중심; 개별 계통연계 study를 대체하지 않음; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
          content: 'Large load study·tariff·co-location policy layer; boundary: 미국 연방관할·진행 중 절차; 보편 Grid rule 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-007
          operation: IT capacity·facility energy·interconnection·metered load 단위를 category 대조
          relation_found: 5 GW 값의 IT-category placement
          relation_not_found: facility total demand·POI capacity·metered MW
          conditions:
          - PUE numerator/denominator 및 campus allocation 필요
          - large-load model에는 site topology·controls 필요
          limits:
          - meter map·PUE·POI·interconnection study 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Hyperion 5 GW는 IT capacity로만 보존되며 grid demand 또는 승인 interconnection과 동일하지 않다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-008
        seat: XZ
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-011
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-012
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-020
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-011
          content: 2026~2030년에 미국과 유럽에서 10.5 GW를 초과하는 신규 재생에너지 용량을 제공하기 위한 Framework Agreement를 발표함. 발표문은 Cloud와 AI 도입이 전력수요를 증가시킨다고 직접 언급함.
          source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-012
          content: 'NIS, interactive linkages, governance, coordination; boundary: 일반 혁신시스템; Fusion 전용 인과모형 아님; linked models: ZM-IN-001, ZM-IN-003'
          source_url: https://www.oecd.org/content/dam/oecd/en/publications/reports/2005/08/governance-of-innovation-systems_g1gh5aee/9789264011038-en.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
          content: '대규모 Data Center load·BPS·backup transfer risk; boundary: 북미 BPS 중심; 개별 계통연계 study를 대체하지 않음; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
          content: 'Large load study·tariff·co-location policy layer; boundary: 미국 연방관할·진행 중 절차; 보편 Grid rule 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-020
          content: 'Generation·storage·grid·efficiency·demand resources; boundary: 옵션 목록; 특정 조합의 경제성 보증 아님; linked models: NO_MODEL_LINK_DECLARED_IN_INPUT'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/oe/clean-energy-resources-meet-data-center-electricity-demand
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-008

          relation_not_found: 개별 site 공급·운영·발전량
          conditions:
          - 2026–2030 framework 기간 유지
          - AI 수요 언급과 특정 site causal attribution 분리

          - project list·site meter·grid studies 없음

          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-009
        seat: XZ
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-010
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-016
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
          content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
          content: CFS는 Google과 200 MW PPA를 체결했고 Chesterfield County의 첫 ARC가 2030년대 초 Grid 공급을 목표로 한다고 발표함.
          source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
          content: 'Fusion gain·power-plant boundary 용어 교차확인; boundary: 개별 설계의 Net output을 보증하지 않음; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-003, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/MTCD/Publications/PDF/FusionOutlook2023_web.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-010
          content: 'Qeng 식, electrical produced/consumed, recirculating power; boundary: 특정 자기밀폐 개념·가정; 보편 Fusion 식 아님; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-002,
            ZM-FU-003'
          source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/mtcd/meetings/PDFplus/2010/cn180/cn180_papers/ftp_2-2.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
          content: 'Fusion RDD&D·ARL·ecosystem·risk layers; boundary: 목표·전략이며 성취사실 또는 확정일정 아님; linked models: ZM-TR-003, ZM-IN-003, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-016
          content: '비기술적 adoption risk·commercialization; boundary: 기술성능 또는 시장성공을 단독 증명하지 않음; linked models: ZM-TR-003, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/technologycommercialization/adoption-readiness-levels-arl-framework
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
          content: 'Emerging U.S. Fusion licensing·oversight actor; boundary: 미국 관할; 설계·연료·Site별 적용은 별도; linked models: ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/materials/fusion/vision-strategy
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-009
          operation: contracted capacity를 plasma Q·engineering gain·net export·adoption stage와 분리
          relation_found: contract·actor·future project stage relation
          relation_not_found: net-positive operation·grid delivery·commercial reliability
          conditions:
          - Fusion model은 concept-specific
          - developer/corporate announcement를 independent performance proof로 사용하지 않음
          limits:
          - plant design·auxiliary ledger·integrated test·license state 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: CFS 200 MW는 미래 계약 경계이며 fusion net output 또는 Data Center 공급 성과로 승격되지 않는다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-010
        seat: XZ
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-010
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-016
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
          content: Microsoft에 2028년 목표로 전력을 공급하고 1년 Ramp-up 후 최소 50 MW를 제공하는 PPA를 발표함.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
          content: Malaga Site에서 초기 Earthwork와 발전소 건설을 시작했다고 발표하고 Microsoft에 최소 50 MW를 공급할 계획을 반복함.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
          content: Conditional Use Permit를 받고 다음 건설단계로 진행한다고 발표함. Microsoft PPA와 2028년 목표를 재확인함.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
          content: 'Fusion gain·power-plant boundary 용어 교차확인; boundary: 개별 설계의 Net output을 보증하지 않음; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-003, ZM-TO-001'

          content: 'Qeng 식, electrical produced/consumed, recirculating power; boundary: 특정 자기밀폐 개념·가정; 보편 Fusion 식 아님; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-002,
            ZM-FU-003'
          source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/mtcd/meetings/PDFplus/2010/cn180/cn180_papers/ftp_2-2.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
          content: 'Fusion RDD&D·ARL·ecosystem·risk layers; boundary: 목표·전략이며 성취사실 또는 확정일정 아님; linked models: ZM-TR-003, ZM-IN-003, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-016
          content: '비기술적 adoption risk·commercialization; boundary: 기술성능 또는 시장성공을 단독 증명하지 않음; linked models: ZM-TR-003, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/technologycommercialization/adoption-readiness-levels-arl-framework
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
          content: 'Emerging U.S. Fusion licensing·oversight actor; boundary: 미국 관할; 설계·연료·Site별 적용은 별도; linked models: ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
          source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/materials/fusion/vision-strategy
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-010
          operation: 계약·건설·지방허가·net operation을 분리
          relation_found: contract→construction→permit의 관측된 stage sequence
          relation_not_found: 2028 상업운전·지속 net output·grid injection
          conditions:
          - 특정 지방허가를 모든 승인 완료로 해석하지 않음
          - PPA output을 achieved output으로 변환하지 않음
          limits:
          - integrated operation·net meter·grid study 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Helion 사례는 계약·건설·허가 진행을 보이지만 실제 fusion 전력공급은 OPEN_FUTURE다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-011
        seat: XZ
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
          content: 2025년에 12 GW를 초과하는 Net-new Clean Energy 계약을 체결했다고 보고함. 해당 수치는 PPA·Storage·Energy Attributes를 포함하고 실제 발전량은 달라질 수 있다고 각주로 경계를 명시함. 2025년
            Freshwater Consumption의 약 78%에 해당하는 77억 gallon을 Replenish했다고 보고함.
          source_url: https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
          content: 'Bottom-up IT, PUE/WUE, cooling, grid carbon/water intensity; boundary: 미국 aggregate estimate·scenario; 개별 Site 인과증거 아님; linked models:
            ZM-EN-002, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://eta-publications.lbl.gov/sites/default/files/2024-12/lbnl-2024-united-states-data-center-energy-usage-report_1.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
          content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/77692.html
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
          content: 'Withdrawal·consumptive use·return flow 구분; boundary: Data center 전용 Model 아님; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-terminology
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
          content: 'Withdrawal와 consumption accounting; boundary: 미국 물 사용 분류·자료경계; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003'
          source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-united-states
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-011
          operation: portfolio contract·actual generation 및 replenishment·consumption·withdrawal category를 분리
          relation_found: aggregate values의 category placement
          relation_not_found: 특정 site 전력·물 영향 및 직접 상쇄
          conditions:
          - 보고연도와 global firm scope 유지
          - replenishment를 withdrawal/consumption과 동일시하지 않음
          limits:
          - site/basin/time-matched data 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Google aggregate 계약과 replenishment 수치는 각 category에서만 유효하며 특정 Site 성과로 배분할 수 없다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-012
        seat: XZ
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-018
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-025
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-018
          content: 2021년 Global Data Center Fleet가 43억 gallon을 소비했고 평균 Google Data Center가 일일 약 450,000 gallon을 소비한다고 보고함. 일부 Campus에서 Reclaimed/Non-potable
            Water를 사용하며 Douglas County Georgia에서는 Municipal Wastewater를 재활용한다고 설명함.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
          content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/77692.html
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
          content: 'WUE 식·직접/Source water 논의 보조; boundary: 국제표준과 판본·범위 확인 필요; linked models: ZM-WA-001'
          source_url: https://www.thegreengrid.org/system/files/store/WUE_v1.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
          content: 'Withdrawal·consumptive use·return flow 구분; boundary: Data center 전용 Model 아님; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-terminology
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
          content: 'Withdrawal와 consumption accounting; boundary: 미국 물 사용 분류·자료경계; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003'
          source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-united-states
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-025
          content: 'Cooling-water efficiency·metering·operations; boundary: 연방시설 지침; 모든 기후·기술의 최적해 아님; linked models: NO_MODEL_LINK_DECLARED_IN_INPUT'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/cmei/femp/cooling-water-efficiency-opportunities-federal-data-centers
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-012
          operation: fleet average·site method·site measurement를 분리
          relation_found: water metric scope mismatch의 검증
          relation_not_found: 특정 site consumption·WUE·ecological impact
          conditions:
          - 2021 fleet context 유지
          - cooling method를 measured water use로 해석하지 않음
          limits:
          - site water and IT meters 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Google fleet·평균 수치는 특정 Site 실측으로 사용할 수 없으며 wastewater reuse 사례도 절대 사용량을 제공하지 않는다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-013
        seat: XZ
        state: CONFLICT
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
          content: Current Page는 AWS Global Data Center WUE를 0.12 L/kWh로 제시하고 24개 Data Center에서 Recycled Water를 사용하며 2030년까지 미국 120개 이상 Location으로 확대할 계획이라고
            명시함.
          source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
          content: 2024 AWS Global WUE를 0.15 L/kWh로 보고하고 2021 0.25, 2022 0.19, 2023 0.18, 2024 0.15의 시계열을 제시함. North America에서 냉각용 물수요 946 million liters
            감소와 AI Workload용 Integrated Liquid Cooling 설계를 보고함.
          source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
          content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/77692.html
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
          content: 'WUE 식·직접/Source water 논의 보조; boundary: 국제표준과 판본·범위 확인 필요; linked models: ZM-WA-001'
          source_url: https://www.thegreengrid.org/system/files/store/WUE_v1.pdf
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-013
          operation: 동일 명칭 metric의 reporting period·category·methodology 정렬 여부 검사
          relation_found: WUE conflict와 required methodology bridge
          relation_not_found: 어느 값이 현재 동일범위의 우선값인지
          conditions:
          - WUE category·period·source disposition 정렬 필요
          limits:
          - dated methodology note·archived page·new report table 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: AWS WUE 0.12와 0.15 L/kWh는 현재 입력에서 해소되지 않는 공식 Source 충돌이다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-014
        seat: XZ
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-021
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-021
          content: AWS는 Virginia의 Direct Operations에서 2025년 263,169,407 gallons(996,204,576 liters)을 Withdrawal했다고 보고함.
          source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/aws-sustainability-fact-sheets/aws-fact-sheet-virginia.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
          content: 'Withdrawal·consumptive use·return flow 구분; boundary: Data center 전용 Model 아님; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003, ZM-TO-001'

        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
          content: 'Withdrawal와 consumption accounting; boundary: 미국 물 사용 분류·자료경계; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003'

          - XZ-FA-014
          operation: region withdrawal·site consumption·return flow category를 대조
          relation_found: water accounting terminology fit
          relation_not_found: consumptive use·return flow·site allocation
          conditions:
          - Virginia regional scope 유지
          - withdrawal을 consumption/replenishment로 바꾸지 않음
          limits:
          - return flow·site split 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: AWS Virginia 값은 region aggregate withdrawal이며 단일 Data Center consumption이 아니다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-015
        seat: XZ
        state: OPEN_FUTURE
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-005
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-007
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-011
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-003
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002
          content: Kairos–TVA PPA에 따라 Hermes 2의 50 MW가 TVA Grid에 공급될 예정이며 Google은 TVA를 통해 Tennessee Montgomery County와 Alabama Jackson County Data Center
            수요에 대응하는 Clean Energy Attributes를 조달한다고 발표함. 목표시점은 2030년임.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-first-advanced-nuclear-reactor-project-with-kairos-power-and-tennessee-valley-authority/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
          content: 기존 공동입지 부하 300 MW를 480 MW로 늘리기 위한 개정 ISA 제안을 FERC가 거부함. 480 MW 초과 시 Generation Deliverability Violations와 추가 Upgrade 필요성이 문서에 제시됨.
          source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-005
          content: Microsoft와 20년 PPA를 체결하고 약 835 MW 원전을 재가동하여 PJM 지역 Microsoft Data Center 전력사용을 상쇄하는 계획을 발표함. 목표운전시점은 2028년이며 규제·주·지방 승인이 필요하다고 명시함.
          source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-007
          content: Meta와 20년 PPA를 발표했으며 계약대상은 1,121 MW의 배출없는 원자력 에너지이고 시작시점은 2027년 6월로 제시됨. 약 30 MW Uprate와 장기운영 지원도 발표됨.
          source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2025/constellation-meta-sign-20-year-deal-for-clean-reliable-nuclear-energy-in-illinois.html
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
          content: 투자규모를 500억 달러 이상, 건물면적을 약 1,000만 ft², IT capacity를 5 GW로 확대했다고 발표하고 Hyperion을 Meta 최대 AI Training Cluster로 직접 귀속함.
          source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-011
          content: 2026~2030년에 미국과 유럽에서 10.5 GW를 초과하는 신규 재생에너지 용량을 제공하기 위한 Framework Agreement를 발표함. 발표문은 Cloud와 AI 도입이 전력수요를 증가시킨다고 직접 언급함.
          source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
          content: 'PUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Standard 전문 세부는 라이선스 경계; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/30134-2
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-003
          content: 'IT·air·cooling·electrical·heat recovery·metering; boundary: 설계지침; 개별 Site 실측치 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-EN-002'
          source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-07/best-practice-guide-data-center-design_0.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
          content: 'Bottom-up IT, PUE/WUE, cooling, grid carbon/water intensity; boundary: 미국 aggregate estimate·scenario; 개별 Site 인과증거 아님; linked models:
            ZM-EN-002, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://eta-publications.lbl.gov/sites/default/files/2024-12/lbnl-2024-united-states-data-center-energy-usage-report_1.pdf
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-015
          operation: MW quantity type과 meter boundary를 model input requirements에 대조
          relation_found: energy boundary model coverage
          relation_not_found: site energy closure·PUE·load residual
          conditions:
          - 같은 기간·경계·단위 필요
          - campus allocation 없는 임의 배분 금지
          limits:
          - total facility energy·IT energy·onsite/storage/export meter 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Data Center energy models의 coverage는 있으나 현재 X Data만으로 site-level Fit은 시험할 수 없다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-016
        seat: XZ
        state: OPEN_FUTURE
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
          pair_ids:
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
          - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
          - XZ-CSP-Z-S-010
        preserved_content_and_sources:
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
          content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
          source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
          content: CFS는 Google과 200 MW PPA를 체결했고 Chesterfield County의 첫 ARC가 2030년대 초 Grid 공급을 목표로 한다고 발표함.
          source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
          content: Microsoft에 2028년 목표로 전력을 공급하고 1년 Ramp-up 후 최소 50 MW를 제공하는 PPA를 발표함.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
          content: Malaga Site에서 초기 Earthwork와 발전소 건설을 시작했다고 발표하고 Microsoft에 최소 50 MW를 공급할 계획을 반복함.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
          content: Conditional Use Permit를 받고 다음 건설단계로 진행한다고 발표함. Microsoft PPA와 2028년 목표를 재확인함.
          source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
          content: 'Fusion gain·power-plant boundary 용어 교차확인; boundary: 개별 설계의 Net output을 보증하지 않음; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-003, ZM-TO-001'
          source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/MTCD/Publications/PDF/FusionOutlook2023_web.pdf
        - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-010
          content: 'Qeng 식, electrical produced/consumed, recirculating power; boundary: 특정 자기밀폐 개념·가정; 보편 Fusion 식 아님; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-002,
            ZM-FU-003'
          source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/mtcd/meetings/PDFplus/2010/cn180/cn180_papers/ftp_2-2.pdf
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-016
          operation: contracted/offtake capacity와 achieved plant power terms를 단위·boundary 대조
          relation_found: 필요 변수와 관측값의 불일치 식별
          relation_not_found: plasma gain·engineering gain·gross/net performance
          conditions:
          - plant concept와 meter location 명시 필요
          limits:
          - Pfusion·Paux·thermal efficiency·recirculating loads·net meter 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: 현재 Fusion 계약 MW는 Z의 gain·gross/net 모델에 직접 대입할 수 없는 category다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      - cell_id: XZ-FC-017
        seat: XZ
        state: CONFLICT
        inherited_content_source_pairs:
