```yaml
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-018
      content: 2021년 Global Data Center Fleet가 43억 gallon을 소비했고 평균 Google Data Center가 일일 약 450,000 gallon을 소비한다고 보고함. 일부 Campus에서 Reclaimed/Non-potable
        Water를 사용하며 Douglas County Georgia에서는 Municipal Wastewater를 재활용한다고 설명함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
      content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/77692.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
      content: 'WUE 식·직접/Source water 논의 보조; boundary: 국제표준과 판본·범위 확인 필요; linked models: ZM-WA-001'
      source_url: https://www.thegreengrid.org/system/files/store/WUE_v1.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
      content: 'Withdrawal·consumptive use·return flow 구분; boundary: Data center 전용 Model 아님; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-terminology
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-008

      source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-united-states
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-025
      content: 'Cooling-water efficiency·metering·operations; boundary: 연방시설 지침; 모든 기후·기술의 최적해 아님; linked models: NO_MODEL_LINK_DECLARED_IN_INPUT'
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/cmei/femp/cooling-water-efficiency-opportunities-federal-data-centers
    function_views:

        state: VERIFIED_RELATION

          - 2021 fleet context 유지
          - cooling method를 measured water use로 해석하지 않음
          limits:

  - cell_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-013
    state: CONFLICT
    seat_positions:
    - XZ
    inherited_pair_ids:

    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
      content: Current Page는 AWS Global Data Center WUE를 0.12 L/kWh로 제시하고 24개 Data Center에서 Recycled Water를 사용하며 2030년까지 미국 120개 이상 Location으로 확대할 계획이라고
        명시함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
      content: 2024 AWS Global WUE를 0.15 L/kWh로 보고하고 2021 0.25, 2022 0.19, 2023 0.18, 2024 0.15의 시계열을 제시함. North America에서 냉각용 물수요 946 million liters 감소와
        AI Workload용 Integrated Liquid Cooling 설계를 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
      content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/77692.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
      content: 'WUE 식·직접/Source water 논의 보조; boundary: 국제표준과 판본·범위 확인 필요; linked models: ZM-WA-001'
      source_url: https://www.thegreengrid.org/system/files/store/WUE_v1.pdf
    function_views:

        originating_cell_id: XZ-FC-013

          conditions:
          - WUE category·period·source disposition 정렬 필요

          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true

  - cell_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-015
    state: OPEN_FUTURE
    seat_positions:
    - XZ
    inherited_pair_ids:
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-005
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-007
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-011
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-003
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002
      content: Kairos–TVA PPA에 따라 Hermes 2의 50 MW가 TVA Grid에 공급될 예정이며 Google은 TVA를 통해 Tennessee Montgomery County와 Alabama Jackson County Data Center 수요에
        대응하는 Clean Energy Attributes를 조달한다고 발표함. 목표시점은 2030년임.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-first-advanced-nuclear-reactor-project-with-kairos-power-and-tennessee-valley-authority/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
      content: 기존 공동입지 부하 300 MW를 480 MW로 늘리기 위한 개정 ISA 제안을 FERC가 거부함. 480 MW 초과 시 Generation Deliverability Violations와 추가 Upgrade 필요성이 문서에 제시됨.
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-005
      content: Microsoft와 20년 PPA를 체결하고 약 835 MW 원전을 재가동하여 PJM 지역 Microsoft Data Center 전력사용을 상쇄하는 계획을 발표함. 목표운전시점은 2028년이며 규제·주·지방 승인이 필요하다고 명시함.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-007
      content: Meta와 20년 PPA를 발표했으며 계약대상은 1,121 MW의 배출없는 원자력 에너지이고 시작시점은 2027년 6월로 제시됨. 약 30 MW Uprate와 장기운영 지원도 발표됨.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2025/constellation-meta-sign-20-year-deal-for-clean-reliable-nuclear-energy-in-illinois.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
      content: 투자규모를 500억 달러 이상, 건물면적을 약 1,000만 ft², IT capacity를 5 GW로 확대했다고 발표하고 Hyperion을 Meta 최대 AI Training Cluster로 직접 귀속함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-011
      content: 2026~2030년에 미국과 유럽에서 10.5 GW를 초과하는 신규 재생에너지 용량을 제공하기 위한 Framework Agreement를 발표함. 발표문은 Cloud와 AI 도입이 전력수요를 증가시킨다고 직접 언급함.
      source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
      content: 'PUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Standard 전문 세부는 라이선스 경계; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/30134-2
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-003
      content: 'IT·air·cooling·electrical·heat recovery·metering; boundary: 설계지침; 개별 Site 실측치 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-EN-002'
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-07/best-practice-guide-data-center-design_0.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
      content: 'Bottom-up IT, PUE/WUE, cooling, grid carbon/water intensity; boundary: 미국 aggregate estimate·scenario; 개별 Site 인과증거 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-002,
        ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://eta-publications.lbl.gov/sites/default/files/2024-12/lbnl-2024-united-states-data-center-energy-usage-report_1.pdf
    function_views:
      XY: NOT_PRESENT_IN_THIS_RESULT_CELL

        originating_cell_id: XZ-FC-015
        state: OPEN_FUTURE

          limits:
          - total facility energy·IT energy·onsite/storage/export meter 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Data Center energy models의 coverage는 있으나 현재 X Data만으로 site-level Fit은 시험할 수 없다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      YZ: NOT_PRESENT_IN_THIS_RESULT_CELL

  - cell_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-016
    state: OPEN_FUTURE
    seat_positions:
    - XZ
    inherited_pair_ids:
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-010
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
      content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
      content: CFS는 Google과 200 MW PPA를 체결했고 Chesterfield County의 첫 ARC가 2030년대 초 Grid 공급을 목표로 한다고 발표함.
      source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
      content: Microsoft에 2028년 목표로 전력을 공급하고 1년 Ramp-up 후 최소 50 MW를 제공하는 PPA를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
      content: Malaga Site에서 초기 Earthwork와 발전소 건설을 시작했다고 발표하고 Microsoft에 최소 50 MW를 공급할 계획을 반복함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
      content: Conditional Use Permit를 받고 다음 건설단계로 진행한다고 발표함. Microsoft PPA와 2028년 목표를 재확인함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
      content: 'Fusion gain·power-plant boundary 용어 교차확인; boundary: 개별 설계의 Net output을 보증하지 않음; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-003, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/MTCD/Publications/PDF/FusionOutlook2023_web.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-010
      content: 'Qeng 식, electrical produced/consumed, recirculating power; boundary: 특정 자기밀폐 개념·가정; 보편 Fusion 식 아님; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-002,
        ZM-FU-003'
      source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/mtcd/meetings/PDFplus/2010/cn180/cn180_papers/ftp_2-2.pdf
    function_views:
      XY: NOT_PRESENT_IN_THIS_RESULT_CELL

        직접 언급함.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
      content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013

    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015

      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa

    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
      content: 'Fusion RDD&D·ARL·ecosystem·risk layers; boundary: 목표·전략이며 성취사실 또는 확정일정 아님; linked models: ZM-TR-003, ZM-IN-003, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-014
      content: 'TRL 1–9, particular technology maturity; boundary: NASA environment 정의를 타 기관에 무수정 적용 불가; linked models: ZM-TR-001'
      source_url: https://www.nasa.gov/directorates/somd/space-communications-navigation-program/technology-readiness-levels/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-015

      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/documents/technology-readiness-assessment-guide
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-016

      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/prod/files/PARS_II_SOP_Version_1.1_2011_08_11.pdf

      source_url: https://www.nasa.gov/reference/3-0-nasa-program-project-life-cycle/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-023

      source_url: https://www.iaea.org/topics/infrastructure-development/milestones-approach

  - cell_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-018
    state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    seat_positions:
    - XZ
    inherited_pair_ids:
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-018
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-021
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-025
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
      content: 2025년에 12 GW를 초과하는 Net-new Clean Energy 계약을 체결했다고 보고함. 해당 수치는 PPA·Storage·Energy Attributes를 포함하고 실제 발전량은 달라질 수 있다고 각주로 경계를 명시함. 2025년 Freshwater
        Consumption의 약 78%에 해당하는 77억 gallon을 Replenish했다고 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-018
      content: 2021년 Global Data Center Fleet가 43억 gallon을 소비했고 평균 Google Data Center가 일일 약 450,000 gallon을 소비한다고 보고함. 일부 Campus에서 Reclaimed/Non-potable
        Water를 사용하며 Douglas County Georgia에서는 Municipal Wastewater를 재활용한다고 설명함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
      content: Current Page는 AWS Global Data Center WUE를 0.12 L/kWh로 제시하고 24개 Data Center에서 Recycled Water를 사용하며 2030년까지 미국 120개 이상 Location으로 확대할 계획이라고
        명시함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
      content: 2024 AWS Global WUE를 0.15 L/kWh로 보고하고 2021 0.25, 2022 0.19, 2023 0.18, 2024 0.15의 시계열을 제시함. North America에서 냉각용 물수요 946 million liters 감소와
        AI Workload용 Integrated Liquid Cooling 설계를 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-021
      content: AWS는 Virginia의 Direct Operations에서 2025년 263,169,407 gallons(996,204,576 liters)을 Withdrawal했다고 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/aws-sustainability-fact-sheets/aws-fact-sheet-virginia.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
      content: 'Bottom-up IT, PUE/WUE, cooling, grid carbon/water intensity; boundary: 미국 aggregate estimate·scenario; 개별 Site 인과증거 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-002,
        ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://eta-publications.lbl.gov/sites/default/files/2024-12/lbnl-2024-united-states-data-center-energy-usage-report_1.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
      content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/77692.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
      content: 'WUE 식·직접/Source water 논의 보조; boundary: 국제표준과 판본·범위 확인 필요; linked models: ZM-WA-001'
      source_url: https://www.thegreengrid.org/system/files/store/WUE_v1.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
      content: 'Withdrawal·consumptive use·return flow 구분; boundary: Data center 전용 Model 아님; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-terminology
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
      content: 'Withdrawal와 consumption accounting; boundary: 미국 물 사용 분류·자료경계; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003'
      source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-united-states
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-025
      content: 'Cooling-water efficiency·metering·operations; boundary: 연방시설 지침; 모든 기후·기술의 최적해 아님; linked models: NO_MODEL_LINK_DECLARED_IN_INPUT'
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/cmei/femp/cooling-water-efficiency-opportunities-federal-data-centers
    function_views:
      XY: NOT_PRESENT_IN_THIS_RESULT_CELL
      XZ:
        originating_cell_id: XZ-FC-018
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-018
          operation: direct/indirect, withdrawal/consumption, fleet/site, annual/seasonal boundaries 대조
          relation_found: water-compute model coverage and category alignment
          relation_not_found: site/basin ecological impact와 indirect water total
          conditions:
          - time/region matched grid mix와 source-specific intensity 필요
          limits:
          - site cooling data·basin data·hourly grid mix 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: Energy–Water–Compute 관계는 구조적으로 설명되지만 site impact 평가는 추가 empirical data가 필요하다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      YZ: NOT_PRESENT_IN_THIS_RESULT_CELL
    organization:
      common: NOT_EVALUATED_ACROSS_OTHER_SEATS_BY_GPT_XYZ
      differences: ORIGINATING_FUNCTION_VIEW_PRESERVED_WITHOUT_REINTERPRETATION
      conflicts:
      - XZ-PI-001
      - XZ-PI-005
      - XZ-PI-007
      open_items:
      - XZ-OF-001
      - XZ-OF-004
      - XZ-OF-005
      - XZ-OF-010
      limits:
      - site cooling data·basin data·hourly grid mix 없음
    result_statement:
      statement: Energy–Water–Compute 관계는 구조적으로 설명되지만 site impact 평가는 추가 empirical data가 필요하다.
      organization_only: true
      new_semantic_judgment: false
      originating_function_cell: XZ-FC-018
  - cell_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-019
    state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    seat_positions:
    - XZ
    inherited_pair_ids:
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-009
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-017
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
      content: 기존 공동입지 부하 300 MW를 480 MW로 늘리기 위한 개정 ISA 제안을 FERC가 거부함. 480 MW 초과 시 Generation Deliverability Violations와 추가 Upgrade 필요성이 문서에 제시됨.
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-009
      content: Meta의 AI-optimized Data Center를 Richland Parish에 선정했으며 초기 발표는 약 100억 달러, 약 400만 ft², 약 2,250 acre의 Site 규모를 제시함. Entergy와 전력계획을 협의하고 전력사용을
        100% Clean/Renewable Energy로 Match한다는 목표를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
      content: 투자규모를 500억 달러 이상, 건물면적을 약 1,000만 ft², IT capacity를 5 GW로 확대했다고 발표하고 Hyperion을 Meta 최대 AI Training Cluster로 직접 귀속함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
      content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
      content: CFS는 Google과 200 MW PPA를 체결했고 Chesterfield County의 첫 ARC가 2030년대 초 Grid 공급을 목표로 한다고 발표함.
      source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
      content: Microsoft에 2028년 목표로 전력을 공급하고 1년 Ramp-up 후 최소 50 MW를 제공하는 PPA를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
      content: Malaga Site에서 초기 Earthwork와 발전소 건설을 시작했다고 발표하고 Microsoft에 최소 50 MW를 공급할 계획을 반복함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
      content: Conditional Use Permit를 받고 다음 건설단계로 진행한다고 발표함. Microsoft PPA와 2028년 목표를 재확인함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-017
      content: 'Risk principles·framework·process; boundary: 인증표준·단일 정량 Model이 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-001, ZM-PR-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/65694.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
      content: '대규모 Data Center load·BPS·backup transfer risk; boundary: 북미 BPS 중심; 개별 계통연계 study를 대체하지 않음; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
      content: 'Large load study·tariff·co-location policy layer; boundary: 미국 연방관할·진행 중 절차; 보편 Grid rule 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
      content: 'Emerging U.S. Fusion licensing·oversight actor; boundary: 미국 관할; 설계·연료·Site별 적용은 별도; linked models: ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/materials/fusion/vision-strategy
    function_views:
      XY: NOT_PRESENT_IN_THIS_RESULT_CELL
      XZ:
        originating_cell_id: XZ-FC-019
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        function_processing:
          analysis_ids:
          - XZ-FA-019
          operation: technical·grid·regulatory·water·schedule risk layers의 coverage와 target data를 분리
          relation_found: cross-layer risk coverage
          relation_not_found: 통합 성공확률·site-specific risk magnitude
          conditions:
          - risk objects and dependencies를 독립 등록
          - category presence를 probability로 변환하지 않음
          limits:
          - dynamic grid model·schedule·finance·water·component reliability data 없음
        output_statement:
          statement: 현재 입력은 위험층의 coverage를 제공하지만 통합 정량위험 또는 성공확률은 제공하지 않는다.
          source_supported: true
          interpretation_added: true
      YZ: NOT_PRESENT_IN_THIS_RESULT_CELL
    organization:
      common: NOT_EVALUATED_ACROSS_OTHER_SEATS_BY_GPT_XYZ

      - XZ-OF-002
      - XZ-OF-003
      - XZ-OF-004

      - XZ-OF-010

    result_statement:
      statement: 현재 입력은 위험층의 coverage를 제공하지만 통합 정량위험 또는 성공확률은 제공하지 않는다.
      organization_only: true

  - cell_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-020
    state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    seat_positions:
    - XZ
    inherited_pair_ids:

    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002

    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-018
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
    - XZ-CSP-X-SRC-021
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
    - XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-001
      content: Google은 Kairos의 복수 SMR에서 전력을 구매하는 계약을 발표했고, 첫 배치를 2030년, 추가 배치를 2035년까지 목표로 하며 총 최대 500 MW를 미국 전력망에 공급한다고 명시함. AI 기술을 지원할 신규 전력 필요를 직접 언급함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002
      content: Kairos–TVA PPA에 따라 Hermes 2의 50 MW가 TVA Grid에 공급될 예정이며 Google은 TVA를 통해 Tennessee Montgomery County와 Alabama Jackson County Data Center 수요에
        대응하는 Clean Energy Attributes를 조달한다고 발표함. 목표시점은 2030년임.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-first-advanced-nuclear-reactor-project-with-kairos-power-and-tennessee-valley-authority/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
      content: 기존 공동입지 부하 300 MW를 480 MW로 늘리기 위한 개정 ISA 제안을 FERC가 거부함. 480 MW 초과 시 Generation Deliverability Violations와 추가 Upgrade 필요성이 문서에 제시됨.
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-009
      content: Meta의 AI-optimized Data Center를 Richland Parish에 선정했으며 초기 발표는 약 100억 달러, 약 400만 ft², 약 2,250 acre의 Site 규모를 제시함. Entergy와 전력계획을 협의하고 전력사용을
        100% Clean/Renewable Energy로 Match한다는 목표를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
      content: 투자규모를 500억 달러 이상, 건물면적을 약 1,000만 ft², IT capacity를 5 GW로 확대했다고 발표하고 Hyperion을 Meta 최대 AI Training Cluster로 직접 귀속함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
      content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
      content: CFS는 Google과 200 MW PPA를 체결했고 Chesterfield County의 첫 ARC가 2030년대 초 Grid 공급을 목표로 한다고 발표함.
      source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
      content: Microsoft에 2028년 목표로 전력을 공급하고 1년 Ramp-up 후 최소 50 MW를 제공하는 PPA를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
      content: Malaga Site에서 초기 Earthwork와 발전소 건설을 시작했다고 발표하고 Microsoft에 최소 50 MW를 공급할 계획을 반복함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
      content: Conditional Use Permit를 받고 다음 건설단계로 진행한다고 발표함. Microsoft PPA와 2028년 목표를 재확인함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
      content: 2025년에 12 GW를 초과하는 Net-new Clean Energy 계약을 체결했다고 보고함. 해당 수치는 PPA·Storage·Energy Attributes를 포함하고 실제 발전량은 달라질 수 있다고 각주로 경계를 명시함. 2025년 Freshwater
        Consumption의 약 78%에 해당하는 77억 gallon을 Replenish했다고 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-018
      content: 2021년 Global Data Center Fleet가 43억 gallon을 소비했고 평균 Google Data Center가 일일 약 450,000 gallon을 소비한다고 보고함. 일부 Campus에서 Reclaimed/Non-potable
        Water를 사용하며 Douglas County Georgia에서는 Municipal Wastewater를 재활용한다고 설명함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
      content: Current Page는 AWS Global Data Center WUE를 0.12 L/kWh로 제시하고 24개 Data Center에서 Recycled Water를 사용하며 2030년까지 미국 120개 이상 Location으로 확대할 계획이라고
        명시함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
      content: 2024 AWS Global WUE를 0.15 L/kWh로 보고하고 2021 0.25, 2022 0.19, 2023 0.18, 2024 0.15의 시계열을 제시함. North America에서 냉각용 물수요 946 million liters 감소와
        AI Workload용 Integrated Liquid Cooling 설계를 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-021
      content: AWS는 Virginia의 Direct Operations에서 2025년 263,169,407 gallons(996,204,576 liters)을 Withdrawal했다고 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/aws-sustainability-fact-sheets/aws-fact-sheet-virginia.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
      content: 'PUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Standard 전문 세부는 라이선스 경계; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/30134-2
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
      content: 'Bottom-up IT, PUE/WUE, cooling, grid carbon/water intensity; boundary: 미국 aggregate estimate·scenario; 개별 Site 인과증거 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-002,
        ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://eta-publications.lbl.gov/sites/default/files/2024-12/lbnl-2024-united-states-data-center-energy-usage-report_1.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
      content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/77692.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
      content: 'Withdrawal·consumptive use·return flow 구분; boundary: Data center 전용 Model 아님; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-terminology
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
      content: 'Fusion gain·power-plant boundary 용어 교차확인; boundary: 개별 설계의 Net output을 보증하지 않음; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-003, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/MTCD/Publications/PDF/FusionOutlook2023_web.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-011
      content: 'Fusion RDD&D·ARL·ecosystem·risk layers; boundary: 목표·전략이며 성취사실 또는 확정일정 아님; linked models: ZM-TR-003, ZM-IN-003, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
      content: '대규모 Data Center load·BPS·backup transfer risk; boundary: 북미 BPS 중심; 개별 계통연계 study를 대체하지 않음; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
      content: 'Large load study·tariff·co-location policy layer; boundary: 미국 연방관할·진행 중 절차; 보편 Grid rule 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
      content: 'Emerging U.S. Fusion licensing·oversight actor; boundary: 미국 관할; 설계·연료·Site별 적용은 별도; linked models: ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/materials/fusion/vision-strategy

    - content: '[Y2-ASC-001] 전체 Data Center 전력수요 증가와 AI-focused 증가를 분리해야 한다. AI workload 확대가 일부 증가를 설명하지만 전체 Data Center 증가와 동일하지 않음.'

    - content: '[Y2-ASC-002] AI 전력귀속은 직접 계량과 모델 추정을 구분해야 한다. AI chip 수량·수명·idle power·utilization 가정이 2030 추정치를 변화시킴.'

    - content: '[Y2-ASC-002] AI 전력귀속은 직접 계량과 모델 추정을 구분해야 한다. AI chip 수량·수명·idle power·utilization 가정이 2030 추정치를 변화시킴.'

    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: '[Y2-ASC-003] AI 전용 설비용량이 빠르게 증가했다는 관측후보. Hyperscaler capex와 AI 전용 설비 프로젝트가 물리적 용량 증가로 전환.'
      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
    - content: '[Y2-ASC-003] AI 전용 설비용량이 빠르게 증가했다는 관측후보. Hyperscaler capex와 AI 전용 설비 프로젝트가 물리적 용량 증가로 전환.'
      source_url: https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf
    - content: '[Y2-ASC-008] Data Center 투자경로는 자본시장과 수익기대에 의해 조절된다. Balance sheet 외 자본조달 필요가 커져 시장심리·금리·ROI가 실행률을 조절.'
      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
    - content: '[Y2-ASC-010] 계통신청량은 확정운영부하보다 크게 나타날 수 있다. PJM은 firm/non-firm, 최소 ramp, utilization, national constraint로 요청량을 할인.'
      source_url: https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf

    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: '[Y2-ASC-018] Data Center 물 사용은 냉각방식·밀도·규모에 따라 큰 편차가 있다. 증발식은 refill을 필요로 하고 recirculating·dry 방식은 직접 물 사용이 낮을 수 있음.'
      source_url: https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
    - content: '[Y2-ASC-019] 물 절약과 에너지효율 사이에 Trade-off가 존재할 수 있다. Water-dependent cooling이 더 적은 전력을 사용할 수 있어 PUE만 최적화하면 물 사용을 늘릴 가능성.'
      source_url: https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
    - content: '[Y2-ASC-020] Statewide 물 비중이 작아도 특정 Utility의 지역비중은 클 수 있다. 공간집중으로 statewide <0.5%와 reviewed utilities 0.2–21%가 동시에 관측.'
      source_url: https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
    - content: '[Y2-ASC-021] 물 사용정보 부족이 Site·허가 판단을 불확실하게 만든다. 개발자의 estimate 비공개·법적 권한 불명확·기관 간 정보단절이 사전평가를 제한.'
      source_url: https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf

      - https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html

      verification_state: OPEN_FUTURE
      promotion: PROHIBITED
      involved_pair_ids: []
      related_web_source_urls: []
      consequence: 기존 Cycle 2 Function 단계 표지를 유지하되 새 Stage 의미를 추가하지 않는다.
      required_next_data: 새 stage_id가 필요한 경우 coordination_system의 명시적 지정
      process_lineage:
        inherited_from_object_id: NOT_APPLICABLE
        inherited_from_seat: YZ
        inherited_from_stage_id: C2_F1_YZ
  result_structure_validation:
    exactly_three_indexed_inputs_used: true
    referenced_objects_promoted_to_inputs: false
    transport_suffix_inside_document: false
    input_filename_inside_document: false
    output_filename_inside_document: false
    any_hash_code_inside_document: false
    any_local_path_inside_document: false
    fabricated_content_present: false
    fabricated_source_url_present: false
    fabricated_publisher_or_date_present: false
    all_core_content_has_actual_web_source_url: true
    all_web_source_urls_have_preserved_content: true
    all_result_cells_traceable_to_function_surfaces: true
    XY_surface_preserved: true
    XZ_surface_preserved: true
    YZ_surface_preserved: true
    review_or_reanalysis_performed: false
    new_semantic_judgment_performed: false
    conflicts_preserved: true
    unresolved_items_preserved: true
    active_schema_generated: false
    hash_db_generated: false
    github_mutation: false
    stage_2: STAGE_2_PASS
    stage_3: STAGE_3_PASS
    stage_4: STAGE_4_PASS
    stage_5: STAGE_5_PASS
    stage_6: STAGE_6_PASS
    stage_7: STAGE_7_PASS
  final_result_verdict:
    final_verdict: PASS_RESULT_ORGANIZATION_COMPLETE
    basis:
    - The three directly indexed Function outputs passed external content-identity verification.
    - XY, XZ, and YZ Seat positions and canonical roles remain independent.
    - All inherited core content remains connected to an actual web-source URL.
    - All Function analyses and Function Cells remain traceable to their originating surfaces.
    - Cross-surface repetition and difference are recorded without averaging or semantic promotion.
    - Conflicts and unresolved items remain explicit and unfilled.
    - No new external search, fact, causal judgment, model judgment, Active_Schema, Hash DB, or GitHub mutation was performed.
    limits:
    - Result organization completeness does not convert conditional, conflicting, unknown, or open states into verified subject truth.
    - A shared web source does not merge Function views or Seat positions.
    - The next Function stage may reobserve this Result for error, difference, illusion, omission, and boundary checks.
    counts:
      content_source_pair_count: 239
      function_analysis_count: 76
      function_cell_count: 76
      result_cell_count: 76
      cross_surface_relation_count: 60
      preserved_conflict_count: 54
      unresolved_count: 46
      open_future_count: 46
  handoff:
    target: gpt.xyzt
    produced_object_id: HRTDB_PILOT_RESULT_0002_XYZ
    object_class: RESULT
    canonical_role: Result
    input_surfaces:
    - Function.Result.XY
    - Function.Result.XZ
    - Function.Result.YZ
    content_source_pair_count: 239
    function_analysis_count: 76
    function_cell_count: 76
    result_cell_count: 76
    cross_surface_relation_count: 60
    preserved_conflict_count: 54
    unresolved_count: 46
    open_future_count: 46
    final_verdict: PASS_RESULT_ORGANIZATION_COMPLETE
    next_safe_action: gpt.xyzt verifies the Result structure and, only after approval, issues the second Function-stage review directive to gpt.xy, gpt.xz,
      and gpt.yz.
  baseline_state:
    fixed_as_original_display: true
    mutated_in_result_data: false
    original_display_and_later_correction_separated: true
```

```yaml
  - observation_id: RXY-OBS-001
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xy
    reviewed_from_seat: XY
    review_unit_id: RXY-U-001
    observed_display: Selected AI-linked projects are directly observed, while the claim about AI's share of total Data Center growth remains conditional.
    expected_boundary:
      conditions: Use as a scoped relation, not a universal attribution.
      limits: Workload-level meters and comprehensive global statistics are absent.
    comparison: Cell state, statement, source links, conditions, and limits remain mutually consistent within the XY review lens.
    preliminary_state: NO_DEVIATION_FOUND
    deviation_ids: []

    observed_fact:

    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: Input-field absence versus actual Function usage.
    confirmed_difference:

        pairs.
    deviation_type:
    - DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION

    - PROCESS_ERROR

      detected_by_instance: gpt.xy

  correction_records:
  - correction_id: RXY-COR-001
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-001
    original_display: 'source_use_state: NOT_PRESENT_IN_INPUT'
    corrected_display:
      input_source_use_state_field: NOT_PRESENT_IN_INPUT
      derived_result_usage_state: USED_IN_FUNCTION when originating_function_cells is non-empty; otherwise PRESERVED_NOT_USED_IN_FUNCTION_CELL
    preserved_content: All pair content, URLs, and lineage remain unchanged.
    web_source_url: NOT_APPLICABLE_PROCESS_METADATA
    correction_scope: TERM_BINDING
    requested_by_instance: gpt.xy
    target_instance: gpt.xyz
    target_stage: RESULT_DATA_ORGANIZATION
    unresolved: false
    unresolved_reason: NOT_APPLICABLE
  - correction_id: RXY-COR-002
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-002
    original_display: Google report content ending in “replenishment from con...”.
    corrected_display: Google reported more than 12 GW of net-new clean-energy contracts in 2025 and 7.7 billion gallons replenished, about 78 percent of
      2025 freshwater consumption; the report distinguishes contracted instruments from actual generation and replenishment from consumption.
    preserved_content: Google reported more than 12 GW of net-new clean-energy contracts in 2025 and 7.7 billion gallons replenished, about 78 percent of
      2025 freshwater consumption; the report distinguishes contracted instruments from actual generation and replenishment from consumption.
    web_source_url: https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
    correction_scope: WORDING
    requested_by_instance: gpt.xy
    target_instance: gpt.xyz
    target_stage: RESULT_DATA_ORGANIZATION
    unresolved: false
    unresolved_reason: NOT_APPLICABLE
  - correction_id: RXY-COR-003
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-003
    original_display: Google cooling content ending in “municipal wastewater reuse in Douglas...”.
    corrected_display: Google reported 4.3 billion gallons of global Data Center fleet consumption in 2021, an average of about 450,000 gallons per day
      per Data Center, and use of reclaimed or non-potable water at selected campuses including municipal wastewater reuse in Douglas County.
    preserved_content: Google reported 4.3 billion gallons of global Data Center fleet consumption in 2021, an average of about 450,000 gallons per day
      per Data Center, and use of reclaimed or non-potable water at selected campuses including municipal wastewater reuse in Douglas County.
    web_source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
    correction_scope: WORDING
    requested_by_instance: gpt.xy
    target_instance: gpt.xyz
    target_stage: RESULT_DATA_ORGANIZATION
    unresolved: false
    unresolved_reason: NOT_APPLICABLE
  - correction_id: RXY-COR-004
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-004
    original_display: Repeated Google cooling content ending in “Douglas...”.
    corrected_display: Google reported 4.3 billion gallons of global Data Center fleet consumption in 2021, an average of about 450,000 gallons per day
      per Data Center, and use of reclaimed or non-potable water at selected campuses including municipal wastewater reuse in Douglas County.
    preserved_content: Google reported 4.3 billion gallons of global Data Center fleet consumption in 2021, an average of about 450,000 gallons per day
      per Data Center, and use of reclaimed or non-potable water at selected campuses including municipal wastewater reuse in Douglas County.
    web_source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/

  - correction_id: RXY-COR-005
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-005
    original_display: 'source_supported: true | false | PARTIAL'
    corrected_display: 'cross_input_support_state: FULL | PARTIAL | NOT_ESTABLISHED'
    preserved_content: Substantive statements, source URLs, Cell states, conditions, and limits remain unchanged.
    web_source_url: NOT_APPLICABLE_PROCESS_METADATA
    correction_scope: TERM_BINDING
    requested_by_instance: gpt.xy
    target_instance: gpt.xyz
    target_stage: RESULT_DATA_ORGANIZATION
    unresolved: false
    unresolved_reason: NOT_APPLICABLE
  - correction_id: RXY-COR-006
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-006
    original_display:
      state: VERIFIED_RELATION
      statement: Fusion development predates the current AI boom, while later AI-era offtake may still contribute.
      source_supported: true
    corrected_display:
      state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
      statement: Fusion development predates the current AI boom; the incremental contribution of later AI-era offtake remains unresolved.
      cross_input_support_state: PARTIAL
    preserved_content:
    - CFS announced a 1.8-billion-dollar Series B in 2021 for SPARC and ARC development, citing fusion research progress, climate goals, and commercialization
      before the current AI boom.
    - ITER's official overview documents a long-running international fusion research and demonstration pathway originating in 1985, before current Data
      Center demand.
    - Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty and
      uncertainty of commercial fusion.
    - Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.
    web_source_url:
    - https://www.cfs.energy/news-and-media/commonwealth-fusion-systems-closes-1-8-billion-series-b-round/
    - https://www.iter.org/
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    correction_scope: VERDICT_LEVEL
    requested_by_instance: gpt.xy
    target_instance: gpt.xyz
    target_stage: RESULT_DATA_ORGANIZATION
    unresolved: false
    unresolved_reason: NOT_APPLICABLE
  - correction_id: RXY-COR-007
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-007
    original_display:
      XY-PI-003: 'current_state: CONFLICT'
      XY-PI-007: 'current_state: CONFLICT'
    corrected_display:
      XY-PI-003: 'current_state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS; boundary_state: BASELINE_VERSUS_REJECTED_CHANGE'
      XY-PI-007: 'current_state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS; boundary_state: AGGREGATE_AND_SITE_METRICS_NON_EQUIVALENT'
    preserved_content:
    - The Susquehanna record distinguishes a 300 MW baseline from a proposed 480 MW increment that was rejected.
    - Fleet, global, regional, average, WUE, withdrawal, consumption, and replenishment values are not interchangeable with a site measurement.
    web_source_url:
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
    - https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
    - https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
    - https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/aws-sustainability-fact-sheets/aws-fact-sheet-virginia.pdf
    - https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
    - https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
    - https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
    - https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf
    correction_scope: TERM_BINDING
    requested_by_instance: gpt.xy
    target_instance: gpt.xyz
    target_stage: RESULT_DATA_ORGANIZATION
    unresolved: false
    unresolved_reason: NOT_APPLICABLE
  - correction_id: RXY-COR-008
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-008
    original_display: Technology-sector buyers are pursuing multiple energy technologies simultaneously.
    corrected_display: Across the cited dated record, technology-sector buyers announced or contracted multiple energy technologies.
    preserved_content:
    - The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation, storage, efficiency,
      and future pathways.
    - Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500 MW.
    - Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
    - Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through 2035, and up
      to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
    - Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and exploration
      of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
    - Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and Europe during
      2026–2030; the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.
    - Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty and
      uncertainty of commercial fusion.
    - Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.
    web_source_url:
    - https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
    - https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
    - https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
    - https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    correction_scope: WORDING
    requested_by_instance: gpt.xy
    target_instance: gpt.xyz
    target_stage: RESULT_DATA_ORGANIZATION
    unresolved: true
    unresolved_reason: The Result does not state whether “simultaneously” was intended as literal synchronization or broad portfolio coexistence.
  - correction_id: RXY-COR-009
    deviation_id: RXY-DEV-009
    original_display: Amazon's SMR actions are directly linked to broader energy needs and decarbonization, with no basis for an AI-only causal claim.
    corrected_display: The cited Amazon announcement links SMR actions to broader energy needs and decarbonization; it does not establish an AI-only cause.
    preserved_content:
    - Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
    - Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and exploration
      of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
    web_source_url:
    - https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
    - https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
    correction_scope: WORDING
    requested_by_instance: gpt.xy
    target_instance: gpt.xyz
    target_stage: RESULT_DATA_ORGANIZATION
    unresolved: true
    unresolved_reason: The intended scope of “no basis” is not explicitly bound in the displayed sentence.
```

```yaml
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-001
    observed_display: Result lists three historical Function inputs, while the current Review directly possesses only Result.
    expected_boundary: Available, referenced, and displayed-as-available object sets must remain distinct.
    comparison: The Review can preserve the distinction without treating the referenced objects as directly available.
    preliminary_state: NO_DEVIATION_FOUND
  - observation_id: RXZ-OBS-STRUCT-002
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-002
    observed_display: Forty-five inherited XZ pair records display one or more limits as nested singleton lists.
    expected_boundary: Each limitation should be one flat scalar item; list shape must not imply an extra hierarchy.
    comparison: The nested representation is structurally different from the intended flat list.
    preliminary_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  - observation_id: RXZ-OBS-STRUCT-003
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-003
    observed_display: The Result.XZ section is titled Preserved Conflicts although seven of nine records are conditional, verified-boundary, or open states.
    expected_boundary: Conflict, conditional difference, verified boundary, and open issue must remain separate categories.
    comparison: The container title overclassifies non-conflict issue records as conflicts.
    preliminary_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  - observation_id: RXZ-OBS-STRUCT-004
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-004
    observed_display: The Result reports preserved_conflict_count as 54, while the registry contains 43 CONFLICT states and 11 non-CONFLICT issue states.
    expected_boundary: Issue-record count and conflict-state count must be separately labeled.
    comparison: The aggregate label does not match the state composition of the registry.
    preliminary_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  - observation_id: RXZ-OBS-STRUCT-005
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-005
    observed_display: Forty-seven XZ-involved cross-surface entries use UNRESOLVED_CROSS_SURFACE while also declaring organization_only true.
    expected_boundary: Source overlap organization must not be labeled unresolved unless an unresolved semantic difference is specified.
    comparison: The relation type can create a conflict illusion for organization-only co-reference.
    preliminary_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  - observation_id: RXZ-OBS-STRUCT-006
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-006
    observed_display: Seven XZ issue records place composite values such as X_OR_XZ in the singular next_owner_seat field.
    expected_boundary: A singular Seat field must contain one Seat; multiple candidates require a list and unresolved assignment state.
    comparison: The scalar value binds multiple Seats into one pseudo-Seat.
    preliminary_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  - observation_id: RXZ-OBS-STRUCT-007
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-007
    observed_display: XZ pair records refer to open items with item_id while the open registry defines the same identifiers with open_id.
    expected_boundary: Reference key and registry key should use the same identifier term.
    comparison: The values are traceable, but the key mismatch increases process-error risk.
    preliminary_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  - observation_id: RXZ-OBS-STRUCT-008
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-008
    observed_display: Twenty-two X-originating pair records use uncertainty to store NO_CONFLICT_REF_DECLARED or conflict refs.
    expected_boundary: Uncertainty and conflict-reference metadata must be separate fields.
    comparison: Conflict-reference state is displayed under the uncertainty term.
    preliminary_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  - observation_id: RXZ-OBS-STRUCT-009
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.xz
    reviewed_from_seat: XZ
    review_unit_id: RXZ-STRUCT-009
    observed_display: Four XZ cells use VERIFIED_RELATION for category/state-boundary verification while empirical Model Fit remains untested.
    expected_boundary: The verified dimension should be explicit so category verification cannot be read as target Model Fit.
    comparison: The cell statements preserve the limit, but the state label alone remains potentially ambiguous.
    preliminary_state: POSSIBLE_DEVIATION

  micro_deviations:
  - deviation_id: RXZ-DEV-001
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: XZ-FA-004 states that the large-load framework directly explains the X boundary; XZ-FC-004 is VERIFIED_RELATION and says the case
        conforms to the framework.
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: Structural/domain coverage versus target Model Fit, metered-load fit, and dynamic-risk validation.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: The display uses fit-like wording even though the same unit records that metered demand and dynamic risk magnitude
        are absent.
    deviation_type:
    - MISJUDGMENT
    - TERM_BINDING_ERROR
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.xz
      result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
      detected_by_instance: gpt.xz
      deviation_origin: FUNCTION_1_STAGE
    impact:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells:
      - XZ-FA-004
      - XZ-FC-004
      - RESULT-XZ-FC-004
      affected_statements:
      - 직접 설명한다
      - framework에 부합
    cause:
      internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED
    web_source_urls:
    - https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
    - https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
    - https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
  - deviation_id: RXZ-DEV-002
    deviation_state: POSSIBLE_DEVIATION
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: XZ-FC-006, XZ-FC-011, XZ-FC-012, and XZ-FC-014 use VERIFIED_RELATION while their statements verify only state/category boundaries.
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: The verified dimension should be explicit and separate from empirical Model Fit.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: No false subject statement is confirmed, but the standalone state label can be read more broadly than the accompanying
        limits.
    deviation_type:
    - DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    - TERM_BINDING_ERROR
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.xz

    impact:

      - RESULT-XZ-FC-011

      - RESULT-XZ-FC-014

      - VERIFIED_RELATION state without explicit verified_scope

  - deviation_id: RXZ-DEV-007
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: Seven XZ issue records use composite scalar values in next_owner_seat.
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: One Seat value versus multiple candidate owner Seats and unresolved assignment.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: Values such as X_OR_XZ are not one Seat and bind alternatives into a pseudo-Seat.

  - correction_id: RXZ-COR-001
    deviation_id: RXZ-DEV-001
    original_display: Z의 large-load framework는 X의 boundary를 직접 설명한다 / 사례는 framework에 부합 / VERIFIED_RELATION.
    corrected_display:
      state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
      model_coverage_state: COVERED_FOR_LARGE_LOAD_INTERCONNECTION_CATEGORY
      model_fit_state: NOT_TESTED
      statement: Susquehanna 사례는 large-load interconnection category에 구조적으로 대응하지만 실제 metered demand와 dynamic-risk Model Fit은 시험되지 않았다.

  - open_id: XZ-OF-001
    subject: SITE_METERED_ELECTRICITY_AND_PUE
    current_state: OPEN_FUTURE
    known_from_result: X reports IT capacity and multiple announced/contracted quantities; Z defines facility energy and PUE boundaries.
    unknown: target Site total facility energy, IT energy, meter location, period, and campus allocation
    required_next_data_type:
    - site meter map
    - aligned total facility and IT energy measurements
    - campus allocation rule
    promotion_rule: 자료가 없으면 model Fit 또는 efficiency verdict를 생성하지 않음
    web_source_urls:
    - https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history

    one_result_direct_input_only: true
    available_and_referenced_objects_separated: true

    any_filename_inside_document: false

    all_verified_subject_content_has_web_source_url: true
    process_display_units_marked_not_applicable_for_web_source: true
    all_deviations_have_instance_trace: true
    all_corrections_preserve_content_source: true
    seat_boundary_preserved: true
    no_xy_final_causal_judgment_performed: true
    no_yz_final_mechanism_judgment_performed: true

    conflicts_preserved: true
    unresolved_items_preserved: true

    stage_4: STAGE_4_PASS
    stage_5: STAGE_5_PASS
    stage_6: STAGE_6_PASS
    stage_7: STAGE_7_PASS
  final_verdict:
    final_verdict: PASS_WITH_CORRECTIONS_AND_OPEN_ITEMS
    basis:
    - The single directly received Result satisfies the direct-input boundary.
    - Result.XZ preserves all twenty Function Cell states and statements in the organized Result Cells.
    - All reviewed subject content remains connected to actual web-source URLs displayed in Result.
    - Eight confirmed micro-deviations and one possible micro-deviation were retained rather than erased.
    - Every proposed correction is organizational, terminological, structural, or verdict-scope limited and preserves the original content and URLs.
    - The ten XZ open-future subject cells remain unfilled.
    review_unit_count: 48
    no_deviation_count: 39
    possible_deviation_count: 1
    confirmed_deviation_count: 8
    correction_count: 9
    unresolved_count: 10
    pass_boundary: Review execution is complete; affected Result.Data boundaries must not pass without applying the listed corrections.
  handoff:
    target: gpt.xyz
    produced_object_id: HRTDB_PILOT_RESULT_0002_XZ_CYCLE_REVIEW

    generated_by_instance: gpt.xz

    - RXZ-COR-006

    - RXZ-COR-008
    - RXZ-COR-009
    final_verdict: PASS_WITH_CORRECTIONS_AND_OPEN_ITEMS
    next_safe_action: gpt.xyz receives Review.XY, Review.XZ, and Review.YZ together with the unchanged Result, applies seat-local corrections without averaging,
      preserves every web-source URL and open item, and then organizes Result.Data.
```

```yaml
  - review_unit_id: YZ-RU-008
    displayed_content:
      statement: Fusion 개발은 현재 AI 수요 이전의 연구·정책·자본 경로를 가지며, 이후 AI 관련 계약의 추가기여 가능성과 양립한다. 어느 한쪽의 독점적 인과는 확인되지 않는다.
      state: CONFLICT
    web_source:
      source_url:
      - https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf

  - review_unit_id: YZ-RU-009
    displayed_content:
      statement: 수요시점과 Fusion 공급시점은 구조적으로 비동기이며, 현재 입력의 목표일은 실제 상업공급일이 아니다. 단기수요 충족 메커니즘으로 Fusion을 확정할 수 없다.
      state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS

  - review_unit_id: YZ-RU-010
    displayed_content:
      statement: AI→Fusion R&D와 기업→미래 Fusion 전력구매는 방향·객체·단계가 다른 관계다. Plasma Q·engineering gain·Net export 또한 별도 경계이므로 하나의 AI–Fusion 인과문장으로 병합할 수 없다.
      state: VERIFIED_RELATION

    displayed_content:
      statement: PUE·facility ledger는 전력경계를 제공하지만 사용자수·작업강도·탄력성을 제공하지 않는다. Rebound는 메커니즘 후보로 유지되며 정량효과는 OPEN_FUTURE다.

  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-009
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
    review_unit_id: YZ-RU-009
    observed_display: 수요시점과 Fusion 공급시점은 구조적으로 비동기이며, 현재 입력의 목표일은 실제 상업공급일이 아니다. 단기수요 충족 메커니즘으로 Fusion을 확정할 수 없다.
    expected_boundary: Mechanism state, source role, evidence role, and display completeness must remain explicit.

  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-010
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
    review_unit_id: YZ-RU-010
    observed_display: AI→Fusion R&D와 기업→미래 Fusion 전력구매는 방향·객체·단계가 다른 관계다. Plasma Q·engineering gain·Net export 또한 별도 경계이므로 하나의 AI–Fusion 인과문장으로 병합할 수 없다.

  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-011
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
    review_unit_id: YZ-RU-011
    observed_display: PUE·facility ledger는 전력경계를 제공하지만 사용자수·작업강도·탄력성을 제공하지 않는다. Rebound는 메커니즘 후보로 유지되며 정량효과는 OPEN_FUTURE다.

  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-012
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
    review_unit_id: YZ-RU-012
    observed_display: 비Fusion 조달대안과 AI 이전 Fusion 경로는 반사실 범위를 좁히지만, 제약 제거 시 실제 선택변화와 AI 부재 시 이후 투자경로는 관측되지 않아 부분정렬만 가능하다.

    reviewed_from_seat: YZ

  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-014
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ

    observed_display: Pair-level source roles are present, but collector instance names are absent.
    expected_boundary: Do not infer collector instance; record NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT.
    comparison: Source-role registry is intact; instance lineage is incomplete.

  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-015
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
    review_unit_id: YZ-RU-015
    observed_display: Thirty-seven YZ conflicts are preserved exactly.
    expected_boundary: No conflict deletion, averaging, or resolution by gpt.xyz.

  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-016
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ

  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-017
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
    review_unit_id: YZ-RU-017
    observed_display: Thirteen YZ cells are copied into Result cells without semantic mutation.
    expected_boundary: Result organization must not alter YZ statements, states, sources, or limits.
    comparison: Exact preservation verified.
    preliminary_state: NO_DEVIATION_FOUND
  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-018
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
    review_unit_id: YZ-RU-018
    observed_display: Shared-URL entries use relation_type UNRESOLVED_CROSS_SURFACE.
    expected_boundary: Shared URL must not look like a confirmed or unresolved subject mechanism.
    comparison: Organization note limits the meaning, but the relation label can still create display misperception.
    preliminary_state: POSSIBLE_DEVIATION
  - observation_id: YZ-OBS-019
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
    review_unit_id: YZ-RU-019
    observed_display: Surface is labeled Result.YZ in identity and YZ in the final Function verdict; historical verification is reported without a current-review
      qualifier.
    expected_boundary: Canonical surface term and verification time must remain explicit.
    comparison: One confirmed term inconsistency and one possible temporal display risk are present.
    preliminary_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  micro_deviations:
  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-001
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: Function Cell preserved_content_and_sources entries contain content and URL but omit the pair-level source role.
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: SUPPORTING_SOURCE, OPPOSING_OR_LIMITING_SOURCE, MODEL_REGISTRY_SUMMARY, and SOURCE_REGISTRY_SUMMARY.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: The pair registry contains 17 explicitly opposing or limiting Y-source pairs and 53 Z registry/model pairs,
        while the Cell display removes those role labels.
    deviation_type: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_ERROR
    secondary_type: DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.yz
      result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
      detected_by_instance: gpt.yz
      deviation_origin: FUNCTION_1_STAGE
    impact:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells:
      - YZ-CELL-001
      - YZ-CELL-002
      - YZ-CELL-003
      - YZ-CELL-004
      - YZ-CELL-005
      - YZ-CELL-006
      - YZ-CELL-007
      - YZ-CELL-008
      - YZ-CELL-009
      - YZ-CELL-010
      - YZ-CELL-011
      - YZ-CELL-012
      - YZ-CELL-013
      acute_opposing_source_cells:
      - YZ-CELL-001
      - YZ-CELL-002
      - YZ-CELL-003
      - YZ-CELL-004
      - YZ-CELL-007
      - YZ-CELL-008
      - YZ-CELL-010
      - YZ-CELL-012
      - YZ-CELL-013
      affected_statements:
      - Z의 workload–IT–facility–campus–grid 구조는 Y의 귀속 경계를 설명할 수 있으나, 시설별 workload 계량이 없으므로 AI의 추가 인과기여도는 확인되지 않는다.
      - 발표·신청·자금·조달·건설·운영을 독립 Gate로 두는 구조는 일관되지만, 실제 Gate 통과 기록이 없으므로 pipeline-to-operation 전환은 확인되지 않는다.
      - 계통 병목→대안자원·유연접속의 메커니즘 경로는 구조적으로 가능하지만, 개별 POI·동특성·보호설정·운영실적이 없어 특정 Site 효과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - Y의 냉각·용수 제약 후보는 Z의 물 회계 경계와 일관되지만, Site·기후·유역·실측자료가 없어 물 제약이 실제 입지선택을 바꾼 효과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - 계약은 수익신호·시장형성·자본조달의 기여 메커니즘 후보가 될 수 있으나, 발전소 완공·Net 전력·Data Center 공급을 증명하지 않는다.
      - Fusion 개발은 현재 AI 수요 이전의 연구·정책·자본 경로를 가지며, 이후 AI 관련 계약의 추가기여 가능성과 양립한다. 어느 한쪽의 독점적 인과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - AI→Fusion R&D와 기업→미래 Fusion 전력구매는 방향·객체·단계가 다른 관계다. Plasma Q·engineering gain·Net export 또한 별도 경계이므로 하나의 AI–Fusion 인과문장으로 병합할 수 없다.
      - 비Fusion 조달대안과 AI 이전 Fusion 경로는 반사실 범위를 좁히지만, 제약 제거 시 실제 선택변화와 AI 부재 시 이후 투자경로는 관측되지 않아 부분정렬만 가능하다.
      - TRL·ARL·Project Gate·운영상태는 서로 다른 평가객체다. 계약이나 전략목표만으로 기술성숙도·허가·운전을 추정할 수 없다.
    cause:
      internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED
  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-002
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: Every YZ Function Cell displays four content-source entries while linking fourteen to thirty-six inherited pair IDs.
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: The four displayed entries must be labeled as a representative subset, and the complete pair registry must remain
        explicit.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: The field name preserved_content_and_sources does not state that it is non-exhaustive.
    deviation_type: DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.yz
      result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
      detected_by_instance: gpt.yz
      deviation_origin: FUNCTION_1_STAGE
    impact:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells:
      - YZ-CELL-001
      - YZ-CELL-002
      - YZ-CELL-003
      - YZ-CELL-004
      - YZ-CELL-005
      - YZ-CELL-006
      - YZ-CELL-007
      - YZ-CELL-008
      - YZ-CELL-009
      - YZ-CELL-010
      - YZ-CELL-011
      - YZ-CELL-012
      - YZ-CELL-013
      affected_statements:
      - Cell-level inline source display completeness
    cause:
      internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED
  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-003
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: 'All thirteen YZ Cell output statements use source_supported: true, including UNKNOWN, CONFLICT, and OPEN_FUTURE states.'
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: Support for a boundary or unresolved-status statement must be separated from verification of mechanism operation,
        effect size, or causal truth.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: The boolean has no scope field and can appear stronger than the Cell state.
    deviation_type: TERM_BINDING_ERROR
    secondary_type: MISJUDGMENT_RISK
    instance_trace:

  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-004
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: YZ-CELL-010 and YZ-CELL-013 use state VERIFIED_RELATION.
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: The verified target is category, direction, and stage non-equivalence, not actual mechanism operation or final
        causation.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: No verification_target field binds VERIFIED_RELATION to the narrow boundary relation.
    deviation_type: TERM_BINDING_ERROR
    secondary_type: DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.yz
      result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz

      - YZ-CELL-013
      affected_statements:
      - AI→Fusion R&D와 기업→미래 Fusion 전력구매는 방향·객체·단계가 다른 관계다. Plasma Q·engineering gain·Net export 또한 별도 경계이므로 하나의 AI–Fusion 인과문장으로 병합할 수 없다.
      - TRL·ARL·Project Gate·운영상태는 서로 다른 평가객체다. 계약이나 전략목표만으로 기술성숙도·허가·운전을 추정할 수 없다.
    cause:
      internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED
  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-005
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: YZ-CELL-006 and YZ-CELL-008 use state CONFLICT.
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: These are competing or non-exclusive mechanism paths, not necessarily mutually contradictory source facts.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: No conflict_scope field identifies the type of conflict.
    deviation_type: TERM_BINDING_ERROR
    secondary_type: DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.yz
      result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
      detected_by_instance: gpt.yz
      deviation_origin: FUNCTION_1_STAGE
    impact:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells:
      - YZ-CELL-006
      - YZ-CELL-008
      affected_statements:
      - 기술선택은 수요·탄소목표·신뢰도·정책·자본·공급망이 공동작동하는 경쟁 메커니즘으로 설명되며, AI 단독원인이나 단일 우선기술은 확인되지 않는다.
      - Fusion 개발은 현재 AI 수요 이전의 연구·정책·자본 경로를 가지며, 이후 AI 관련 계약의 추가기여 가능성과 양립한다. 어느 한쪽의 독점적 인과는 확인되지 않는다.
    cause:
      internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED
  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-006
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: The YZ pair lineage records origin object, Seat, and Stage but not content_collected_by_instance.
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: Collector instance must be explicit or recorded as NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT; it must not be inferred from Seat or
        Object ID.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: Collector instance attribution is absent for all 150 YZ pairs.
    deviation_type: INSTANCE_ATTRIBUTION_ERROR
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.yz
      result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
      detected_by_instance: gpt.yz
      deviation_origin: UNDETERMINED
    impact:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells:
      - YZ-CELL-001
      - YZ-CELL-002
      - YZ-CELL-003
      - YZ-CELL-004
      - YZ-CELL-005
      - YZ-CELL-006
      - YZ-CELL-007
      - YZ-CELL-008
      - YZ-CELL-009
      - YZ-CELL-010
      - YZ-CELL-011
      - YZ-CELL-012
      - YZ-CELL-013
      affected_statements:
      - All YZ pair-level instance lineage records
    cause:
      internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED
  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-007
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: 'The YZ identity block uses surface: Result.YZ, while the final Function verdict block uses surface: YZ.'
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: Result.YZ is the Result surface; Function.Result.YZ is the referenced source object role.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: The surface term changes within the same Result section.
    deviation_type: TERM_BINDING_ERROR
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_APPLICABLE_PROCESS_METADATA
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.yz
      result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
      detected_by_instance: gpt.yz
      deviation_origin: UNDETERMINED
    impact:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells: []
      affected_statements:
      - 'surface: Result.YZ'
      - 'surface: YZ'
    cause:
      internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED
  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-008
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: 'Result reports external_identity_verification: INPUT_OBJECT_VERIFIED and surface_mutated_by_gpt_xyz: false.'
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: Function.2 directly received only Result and therefore can treat those fields only as historical statuses reported
        inside Result.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: No current-review qualifier is displayed beside the historical status.
    deviation_type: DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    instance_trace:
      content_collected_by_instance: NOT_APPLICABLE_PROCESS_METADATA
      function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.yz
      result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
      detected_by_instance: gpt.yz
      deviation_origin: RESULT_ORGANIZATION_STAGE
    impact:
      pass_prohibited: false
      affected_cells: []
      affected_statements:
      - Historical input verification and mutation-status fields
    cause:
      internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED
    deviation_certainty: POSSIBLE_DEVIATION
  - deviation_id: YZ-MD-009
    observed_fact:
      what_was_displayed: 'Shared-URL organization entries use relation_type: UNRESOLVED_CROSS_SURFACE.'
    expected_boundary:
      what_should_have_been_distinguished: The established operation is shared-source co-reference; no cross-seat mechanism or substantive relation was
        evaluated by gpt.xyz.
    confirmed_difference:
      what_is_confirmed_wrong_or_different: The organization note provides the limit, but the relation_type itself does not bind the relation to URL co-reference.
    deviation_type: DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    instance_trace:

    content: AI→Fusion R&D와 기업→미래 Fusion 전력구매는 방향·객체·단계가 다른 관계다. Plasma Q·engineering gain·Net export 또한 별도 경계이므로 하나의 AI–Fusion 인과문장으로 병합할 수 없다.
```

```yaml
- deviation_id: YZ-MD-001
  original_display:
    result_unit_ids:
    - YZ-CELL-001
    - YZ-CELL-002
    - YZ-CELL-003
    - YZ-CELL-004
    - YZ-CELL-005
    - YZ-CELL-006
    - YZ-CELL-007
    - YZ-CELL-008
    - YZ-CELL-009
    - YZ-CELL-010
    - YZ-CELL-011
    - YZ-CELL-012
    - YZ-CELL-013
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-001
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-002
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-003
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-004
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-005
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-006
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-007
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-008
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-009
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-010
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-011
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-012
    - RESULT-YZ-CELL-013
    statement: Function Cell preserved_content_and_sources entries contain content and URL but omit the pair-level source role.
    web_source_url:
    - https://escholarship.org/uc/item/32d6m0d1
    - https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
    - https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf
    - https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
    - https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
    - https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
  detected_by:
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
  observed_difference:
    deviation_type: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_ERROR
    secondary_type: DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    confirmed_fact: The pair registry contains 17 explicitly opposing or limiting Y-source pairs and 53 Z registry/model pairs, while the Cell display removes
      those role labels.
    expected_boundary: SUPPORTING_SOURCE, OPPOSING_OR_LIMITING_SOURCE, MODEL_REGISTRY_SUMMARY, and SOURCE_REGISTRY_SUMMARY.
    affected_scope:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells:
      - YZ-CELL-001
      - YZ-CELL-002
      - YZ-CELL-003
      - YZ-CELL-004
      - YZ-CELL-005
      - YZ-CELL-006
      - YZ-CELL-007
      - YZ-CELL-008
      - YZ-CELL-009
      - YZ-CELL-010
      - YZ-CELL-011
      - YZ-CELL-012
      - YZ-CELL-013
      acute_opposing_source_cells:
      - YZ-CELL-001
      - YZ-CELL-002
      - YZ-CELL-003
      - YZ-CELL-004
      - YZ-CELL-007
      - YZ-CELL-008
      - YZ-CELL-010
      - YZ-CELL-012
      - YZ-CELL-013
      affected_statements:
      - Z의 workload–IT–facility–campus–grid 구조는 Y의 귀속 경계를 설명할 수 있으나, 시설별 workload 계량이 없으므로 AI의 추가 인과기여도는 확인되지 않는다.
      - 발표·신청·자금·조달·건설·운영을 독립 Gate로 두는 구조는 일관되지만, 실제 Gate 통과 기록이 없으므로 pipeline-to-operation 전환은 확인되지 않는다.
      - 계통 병목→대안자원·유연접속의 메커니즘 경로는 구조적으로 가능하지만, 개별 POI·동특성·보호설정·운영실적이 없어 특정 Site 효과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - Y의 냉각·용수 제약 후보는 Z의 물 회계 경계와 일관되지만, Site·기후·유역·실측자료가 없어 물 제약이 실제 입지선택을 바꾼 효과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - 계약은 수익신호·시장형성·자본조달의 기여 메커니즘 후보가 될 수 있으나, 발전소 완공·Net 전력·Data Center 공급을 증명하지 않는다.
      - Fusion 개발은 현재 AI 수요 이전의 연구·정책·자본 경로를 가지며, 이후 AI 관련 계약의 추가기여 가능성과 양립한다. 어느 한쪽의 독점적 인과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - AI→Fusion R&D와 기업→미래 Fusion 전력구매는 방향·객체·단계가 다른 관계다. Plasma Q·engineering gain·Net export 또한 별도 경계이므로 하나의 AI–Fusion 인과문장으로 병합할 수 없다.
      - 비Fusion 조달대안과 AI 이전 Fusion 경로는 반사실 범위를 좁히지만, 제약 제거 시 실제 선택변화와 AI 부재 시 이후 투자경로는 관측되지 않아 부분정렬만 가능하다.
      - TRL·ARL·Project Gate·운영상태는 서로 다른 평가객체다. 계약이나 전략목표만으로 기술성숙도·허가·운전을 추정할 수 없다.
    finding_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  origin_attribution:
    deviation_origin_stage: FUNCTION_1_STAGE
    deviation_origin_instance: gpt.yz
    attribution_state: CONFIRMED
  cause:
    internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED

    displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
  detected_by:
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
  observed_difference:
    deviation_type: TERM_BINDING_ERROR
    secondary_type: MISJUDGMENT_RISK
    confirmed_fact: The boolean has no scope field and can appear stronger than the Cell state.
    expected_boundary: Support for a boundary or unresolved-status statement must be separated from verification of mechanism operation, effect size, or
      causal truth.
    affected_scope:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells:
      - YZ-CELL-001
      - YZ-CELL-002
      - YZ-CELL-003
      - YZ-CELL-004
      - YZ-CELL-005
      - YZ-CELL-006
      - YZ-CELL-007
      - YZ-CELL-008
      - YZ-CELL-009
      - YZ-CELL-010
      - YZ-CELL-011
      - YZ-CELL-012
      - YZ-CELL-013
      affected_statements:
      - Z의 workload–IT–facility–campus–grid 구조는 Y의 귀속 경계를 설명할 수 있으나, 시설별 workload 계량이 없으므로 AI의 추가 인과기여도는 확인되지 않는다.
      - 발표·신청·자금·조달·건설·운영을 독립 Gate로 두는 구조는 일관되지만, 실제 Gate 통과 기록이 없으므로 pipeline-to-operation 전환은 확인되지 않는다.
      - 계통 병목→대안자원·유연접속의 메커니즘 경로는 구조적으로 가능하지만, 개별 POI·동특성·보호설정·운영실적이 없어 특정 Site 효과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - Y의 냉각·용수 제약 후보는 Z의 물 회계 경계와 일관되지만, Site·기후·유역·실측자료가 없어 물 제약이 실제 입지선택을 바꾼 효과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - Z 입력에는 전력수지와 risk framework는 있으나 지역별 가격형성·요금배분 Model은 없다. 따라서 Y의 가격상승·하락 경쟁설명은 미해결로 유지된다.
      - 기술선택은 수요·탄소목표·신뢰도·정책·자본·공급망이 공동작동하는 경쟁 메커니즘으로 설명되며, AI 단독원인이나 단일 우선기술은 확인되지 않는다.
      - 계약은 수익신호·시장형성·자본조달의 기여 메커니즘 후보가 될 수 있으나, 발전소 완공·Net 전력·Data Center 공급을 증명하지 않는다.
      - Fusion 개발은 현재 AI 수요 이전의 연구·정책·자본 경로를 가지며, 이후 AI 관련 계약의 추가기여 가능성과 양립한다. 어느 한쪽의 독점적 인과는 확인되지 않는다.
      - 수요시점과 Fusion 공급시점은 구조적으로 비동기이며, 현재 입력의 목표일은 실제 상업공급일이 아니다. 단기수요 충족 메커니즘으로 Fusion을 확정할 수 없다.
      - AI→Fusion R&D와 기업→미래 Fusion 전력구매는 방향·객체·단계가 다른 관계다. Plasma Q·engineering gain·Net export 또한 별도 경계이므로 하나의 AI–Fusion 인과문장으로 병합할 수 없다.
      - PUE·facility ledger는 전력경계를 제공하지만 사용자수·작업강도·탄력성을 제공하지 않는다. Rebound는 메커니즘 후보로 유지되며 정량효과는 OPEN_FUTURE다.
      - 비Fusion 조달대안과 AI 이전 Fusion 경로는 반사실 범위를 좁히지만, 제약 제거 시 실제 선택변화와 AI 부재 시 이후 투자경로는 관측되지 않아 부분정렬만 가능하다.
      - TRL·ARL·Project Gate·운영상태는 서로 다른 평가객체다. 계약이나 전략목표만으로 기술성숙도·허가·운전을 추정할 수 없다.
    finding_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  origin_attribution:
    deviation_origin_stage: FUNCTION_1_STAGE
    deviation_origin_instance: gpt.yz
    attribution_state: CONFIRMED
  cause:
    internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED

    secondary_type: NOT_PRESENT_IN_INPUT

- deviation_id: YZ-MD-007
  original_display:
    result_unit_ids:
```
