    statement: 'The YZ identity block uses surface: Result.YZ, while the final Function verdict block uses surface: YZ.'
    web_source_url:
    - NOT_APPLICABLE_PROCESS_METADATA
    displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
  detected_by:
    reviewed_by_instance: gpt.yz
    reviewed_from_seat: YZ
  observed_difference:
    deviation_type: TERM_BINDING_ERROR
    secondary_type: NOT_PRESENT_IN_INPUT
    confirmed_fact: The surface term changes within the same Result section.
    expected_boundary: Result.YZ is the Result surface; Function.Result.YZ is the referenced source object role.
    affected_scope:
      pass_prohibited: true
      affected_cells: []
      affected_statements:
      - 'surface: Result.YZ'
      - 'surface: YZ'
    finding_state: CONFIRMED_DEVIATION
  origin_attribution:

    deviation_origin_instance: UNDETERMINED
    attribution_state: UNDETERMINED
  cause:
    internal_cause_state: NOT_VERIFIED

    displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
  detected_by:

  observed_difference:
    deviation_type: DISPLAY_MISPERCEPTION
    secondary_type: NOT_PRESENT_IN_INPUT
    confirmed_fact: No current-review qualifier is displayed beside the historical status.
    expected_boundary: Function.2 directly received only Result and therefore can treat those fields only as historical statuses reported inside Result.
    affected_scope:
      pass_prohibited: false
      affected_cells: []
      affected_statements:
      - Historical input verification and mutation-status fields
    finding_state: POSSIBLE_DEVIATION

    deviation_origin_stage: RESULT_ORGANIZATION_STAGE

    attribution_state: CONFIRMED
  cause:

- correction_id: RXY-COR-006
  deviation_id: RXY-DEV-006
  original_display:
    state: VERIFIED_RELATION
    statement: Fusion development predates the current AI boom, while later AI-era offtake may still contribute.
    source_supported: true
  corrected_display:
    state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    statement: Fusion development predates the current AI boom; the incremental contribution of later AI-era offtake remains unresolved.
    cross_input_support_state: PARTIAL
  preserved_content:
  - CFS announced a 1.8-billion-dollar Series B in 2021 for SPARC and ARC development, citing fusion research progress, climate goals, and commercialization
    before the current AI boom.
  - ITER's official overview documents a long-running international fusion research and demonstration pathway originating in 1985, before current Data Center
    demand.
  - Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty and
    uncertainty of commercial fusion.
  - Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.
  web_source_url:
  - https://www.cfs.energy/news-and-media/commonwealth-fusion-systems-closes-1-8-billion-series-b-round/
  - https://www.iter.org/
  - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
  - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
  requested_or_proposed_by_instance: gpt.xy
  target_instance: gpt.xyz
  target_stage: C2_RESULT_DATA_XYZ
  correction_state: APPLIED_WITH_TRACEABLE_EVIDENCE
  application:
    applied_target_units:
    - XY-FC-034
    - RESULT-XY-FC-034
    unresolved_target_units: []
  residual_unresolved_item_ids: []
  limitations: NOT_APPLICABLE
- correction_id: RXY-COR-007
  deviation_id: RXY-DEV-007
  original_display:
    XY-PI-003: 'current_state: CONFLICT'
    XY-PI-007: 'current_state: CONFLICT'
  corrected_display:
    XY-PI-003: 'current_state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS; boundary_state: BASELINE_VERSUS_REJECTED_CHANGE'
    XY-PI-007: 'current_state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS; boundary_state: AGGREGATE_AND_SITE_METRICS_NON_EQUIVALENT'
  preserved_content:
  - The Susquehanna record distinguishes a 300 MW baseline from a proposed 480 MW increment that was rejected.
  - Fleet, global, regional, average, WUE, withdrawal, consumption, and replenishment values are not interchangeable with a site measurement.
  web_source_url:
  - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
  - https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
  - https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
  - https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/aws-sustainability-fact-sheets/aws-fact-sheet-virginia.pdf
  - https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
  - https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
  - https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
  - https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf
  requested_or_proposed_by_instance: gpt.xy
  target_instance: gpt.xyz
  target_stage: C2_RESULT_DATA_XYZ
  correction_state: APPLIED_WITH_TRACEABLE_EVIDENCE

- correction_id: RXY-COR-008
  deviation_id: RXY-DEV-008
  original_display: Technology-sector buyers are pursuing multiple energy technologies simultaneously.
  corrected_display: Across the cited dated record, technology-sector buyers announced or contracted multiple energy technologies.
  preserved_content:
  - The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation, storage, efficiency,
    and future pathways.
  - Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500 MW.
  - Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
  - Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through 2035, and up to
    500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
  - Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and exploration
    of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
  - Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and Europe during 2026–2030;
    the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.
  - Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty and
    uncertainty of commercial fusion.
  - Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.
  web_source_url:
  - https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
  - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
  - https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
  - https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
  - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
  - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
  requested_or_proposed_by_instance: gpt.xy
  target_instance: gpt.xyz
  target_stage: C2_RESULT_DATA_XYZ
  correction_state: PROPOSED_NOT_APPLIED
  application:
    applied_target_units: []
    unresolved_target_units:
    - XY-FC-024
    - RESULT-XY-FC-024
  residual_unresolved_item_ids: []
  limitations: The Result does not state whether “simultaneously” was intended as literal synchronization or broad portfolio coexistence.

  deviation_id: RXY-DEV-009
  original_display: Amazon's SMR actions are directly linked to broader energy needs and decarbonization, with no basis for an AI-only causal claim.

  preserved_content:
  - Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
  - Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and exploration

- correction_id: YZ-COR-004
  deviation_id: YZ-MD-004
  original_display: 'state: VERIFIED_RELATION'
  corrected_display:
    retain_state: VERIFIED_RELATION
    verification_target:
      YZ-CELL-010: DIRECTION_OBJECT_STAGE_AND_ENERGY_BOUNDARY_NON_EQUIVALENCE_ONLY
      YZ-CELL-013: TRL_ARL_PROJECT_GATE_AND_OPERATIONAL_STATE_NON_EQUIVALENCE_ONLY
    not_verified:
    - MECHANISM_OPERATION
    - EFFECT_SIZE
    - FINAL_CAUSATION
    - COMMERCIAL_DELIVERY
  preserved_content:
  - AI→Fusion R&D와 기업→미래 Fusion 전력구매는 방향·객체·단계가 다른 관계다. Plasma Q·engineering gain·Net export 또한 별도 경계이므로 하나의 AI–Fusion 인과문장으로 병합할 수 없다.
  - TRL·ARL·Project Gate·운영상태는 서로 다른 평가객체다. 계약이나 전략목표만으로 기술성숙도·허가·운전을 추정할 수 없다.
  web_source_url:
  - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
  - https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf

- correction_id: YZ-COR-005
  deviation_id: YZ-MD-005
  original_display: 'state: CONFLICT'
  corrected_display:
    retain_state: CONFLICT
    conflict_scope:
      YZ-CELL-006: COMPETING_MULTI_DRIVER_TECHNOLOGY_SELECTION_MECHANISMS
      YZ-CELL-008: NON_EXCLUSIVE_PRE_AI_AND_AI_ERA_FUSION_DEVELOPMENT_PATHS
    not_implied: MUTUALLY_EXCLUSIVE_SOURCE_FACTS
  preserved_content:
  - 기술선택은 수요·탄소목표·신뢰도·정책·자본·공급망이 공동작동하는 경쟁 메커니즘으로 설명되며, AI 단독원인이나 단일 우선기술은 확인되지 않는다.
  - Fusion 개발은 현재 AI 수요 이전의 연구·정책·자본 경로를 가지며, 이후 AI 관련 계약의 추가기여 가능성과 양립한다. 어느 한쪽의 독점적 인과는 확인되지 않는다.

    - continuity_id: RXY-CT-002
      content: Google reported more than 12 GW of net-new clean-energy contracts in 2025 and 7.7 billion gallons replenished, about 78 percent of 2025 freshwater
        consumption; the report distinguishes contracted instruments from actual generation and replenishment from consumption.
      web_source_url: https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/

      content:
      - CFS announced a 1.8-billion-dollar Series B in 2021 for SPARC and ARC development, citing fusion research progress, climate goals, and commercialization
        before the current AI boom.
      - ITER's official overview documents a long-running international fusion research and demonstration pathway originating in 1985, before current Data
        Center demand.
      - Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty
        and uncertainty of commercial fusion.
      - Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.

    - continuity_id: RXY-CT-008
      content:
      - The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation, storage,
        efficiency, and future pathways.
      - Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500 MW.
      - Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
      - Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through 2035, and up
        to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
      - Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and exploration
        of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
      - Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and Europe during
        2026–2030; the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.
      - Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty
        and uncertainty of commercial fusion.
      - Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.

      content: Fusion 개발은 현재 AI 수요 이전의 연구·정책·자본 경로를 가지며, 이후 AI 관련 계약의 추가기여 가능성과 양립한다. 어느 한쪽의 독점적 인과는 확인되지 않는다.

        preserved_content: Meta의 AI-optimized Data Center를 Richland Parish에 선정했으며 초기 발표는 약 100억 달러, 약 400만 ft², 약 2,250 acre의 Site 규모를 제시함. Entergy와 전력계획을
          협의하고 전력사용을 100% Clean/Renewable Energy로 Match한다는 목표를 발표함.
        content_type: SOURCE_CLAIM
        input_claim_ids:
        - NOT_PRESENT_IN_INPUT

      source_use_state: USED_IN_FUNCTION
      content:
        preserved_content: 2025년에 12 GW를 초과하는 Net-new Clean Energy 계약을 체결했다고 보고함. 해당 수치는 PPA·Storage·Energy Attributes를 포함하고 실제 발전량은 달라질 수 있다고 각주로 경계를 명시함.
          2025년 Freshwater Consumption의 약 78%에 해당하는 77억 gallon을 Replenish했다고 보고함.
        content_type: DIRECT_FACT
        input_claim_ids:
        - DF-012
      web_source:
        source_title: Google 2026 Environmental Report
        publisher_or_author: Google
        source_url: https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
        publication_date: 2026; exact page publication date not established in retrieved page
        accessed_at: 2026-07-18 Asia/Seoul

      content:
        preserved_content: '[Y2-ASC-018] Data Center 물 사용은 냉각방식·밀도·규모에 따라 큰 편차가 있다. 증발식은 refill을 필요로 하고 recirculating·dry 방식은 직접 물 사용이 낮을 수 있음.'

      content:
        preserved_content: '[Y2-ASC-036] Fusion 공급시점은 상당수 근접 Data Center 수요시점과 불일치한다. 계통·부하 수요가 먼저 발생하고 Fusion은 실증·허가·건설·ramp를 거쳐야 함.'
        content_type: SOURCE_CLAIM
      web_source:
        source_title: Key Questions on Energy and AI — Executive Summary
        publisher_or_author: International Energy Agency
        source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
        publication_date: '2026-04-16'

        source_position_if_known: NOT_PRESENT_IN_INPUT

        uncertainty: actual commercial COD and dependable output.
        source_scope: 전 세계 Data Center·AI 전력수요, 병목, 자본, PPA, on-site generation, storage.; United States / global demand; 2025–2035

        preserved_content: '[Y2-ASC-038] AI 수요가 없어도 Fusion 개발이 진행됐을 가능성은 역사자료로 지지되나 반사실 확정은 아니다. 이미 존재한 ITER·CFS·정부전략의 동기와 sunk investment가 지속성을 제공할 후보.'

      source_url: https://escholarship.org/uc/item/32d6m0d1
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-008
    - content: Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through 2035,
        and up to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-002
    - content: Louisiana Economic Development later announced that Meta Hyperion had expanded to more than 50 billion dollars, nearly 10 million square
        feet, and 5 GW of IT capacity, and described it as Meta's largest AI training cluster.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history

      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-004
    - content: FERC rejected the proposed amendment that would have increased the Susquehanna co-located load boundary from 300 MW to 480 MW; the order

      pair_id: XY-CS-X-005

    current_verdict: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    verification_state: CORRECTED_WITH_TRACEABLE_EVIDENCE
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: The 2024 LBNL report estimates U.S. Data Center energy, water, and carbon outcomes and treats cryptocurrency electricity in a separate chapter.
      source_url: https://escholarship.org/uc/item/32d6m0d1
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-008
    - content: The Virginia legislative study discusses Data Center electricity, water, cooling, siting, regulation, local concentration, disclosure gaps,
        reclaimed water, and design-dependent water-energy trade-offs.
      source_url: https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-011
    - content: The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation, storage,
        efficiency, and future pathways.
      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-004
    - content: Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and
        exploration of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-004
    - content: Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and Europe
        during 2026–2030; the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.
      source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-012

    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: PJM's 2026 load forecast applies regional large-load adjustments and distinguishes forecast assumptions from actual operating load.
      source_url: https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/library/reports-notices/load-forecast/2026-load-report.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-009
    - content: PJM's working material distinguishes firm and non-firm requests and applies assumptions for ramp time, utilization, and national constraints

      source_url: https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf

      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-004
    - content: Google announced that a 50 MW Hermes 2 project is intended to supply the TVA grid by 2030 and that Google will obtain clean-energy attributes
        through TVA for Data Centers in Tennessee and Alabama.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-first-advanced-nuclear-reactor-project-with-kairos-power-and-tennessee-valley-authority/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-003

        discusses deliverability violations and additional upgrades above the baseline.
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-005
    - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Microsoft PPA and a plan to restart the approximately 835 MW Crane Clean Energy Center for a 2028 target,
        subject to regulatory, state, and local approvals.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-006

    - content: Louisiana Economic Development later announced that Meta Hyperion had expanded to more than 50 billion dollars, nearly 10 million square

    - content: Google reported 4.3 billion gallons of global Data Center fleet consumption in 2021, an average of about 450,000 gallons per day per Data
        Center, and use of reclaimed or non-potable water at selected campuses including municipal wastewater reuse in Douglas County.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-019

        to expand to more than 120 U.S. locations by 2030.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-020
    - content: Amazon reported AWS global WUE of 0.15 L/kWh for 2024, a time series from 2021 through 2024, a 946-million-liter reduction in North American
        cooling-water needs, and integrated liquid cooling for AI workloads.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-021
    - content: AWS reported 263,169,407 gallons of water withdrawn by direct operations in Virginia during 2025.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/aws-sustainability-fact-sheets/aws-fact-sheet-virginia.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-022

      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-011
    - content: Louisiana Economic Development announced an AI-optimized Meta Data Center in Richland Parish with an initial investment of about 10 billion
        dollars, about 4 million square feet, and about 2,250 acres.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-010

        feet, and 5 GW of IT capacity, and described it as Meta's largest AI training cluster.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history

- cell_id: RD-RESULT-XY-FC-024
  baseline:
    result_unit_id: RESULT-XY-FC-024
    originating_function_cell_id: XY-FC-024
    original_display: Technology-sector buyers are pursuing multiple energy technologies simultaneously.
    original_state: VERIFIED_RELATION
    web_source_url:
    - https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
    - https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
    - https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
  instance_lineage:
    collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
    function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.xy
    result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
    function_2_reviewed_by_instances:
    - gpt.xy
  review_positions:
    XY:
    - review_unit_id: RXY-U-024
      displayed_content:
        statement: Technology-sector buyers are pursuing multiple energy technologies simultaneously.
        state: VERIFIED_RELATION
        source_supported_display: true
      result_position:
        surface: Result.XY
        cell_id: XY-FC-024
        section: Function Cells and corresponding Result Cell
    XZ: OUTSIDE_THIS_REVIEW_SEAT_SCOPE
    YZ: OUTSIDE_THIS_REVIEW_SEAT_SCOPE
  deviation_history:
    deviation_ids:
    - RXY-DEV-005
    - RXY-DEV-008
  correction_history:
    applied_correction_ids:
    - RXY-COR-005
    proposed_not_applied_correction_ids:
    - RXY-COR-008
    review_conflict_correction_ids: []
  current_content_state:
    current_display: Technology-sector buyers are pursuing multiple energy technologies simultaneously.
    current_verdict: VERIFIED_RELATION
    verification_state: ORIGINAL_WITH_PROPOSED_CORRECTION_NOT_APPLIED
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation, storage,
        efficiency, and future pathways.
      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-004
    - content: Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500 MW.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-013
    - content: Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-014
    - content: Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through 2035,
        and up to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-002
    - content: Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and
        exploration of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-004
    - content: Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and Europe
        during 2026–2030; the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.
      source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-012
    - content: Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty
        and uncertainty of commercial fusion.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-013
    - content: Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-015
    applied_overlays:
    - correction_id: RXY-COR-005
      field: cross_input_support_state
      value: FULL
  unresolved:
    unresolved_items:
    - RXY-OPEN-001
    open_future: true
- cell_id: RD-RESULT-XY-FC-025
  baseline:
    result_unit_id: RESULT-XY-FC-025
    originating_function_cell_id: XY-FC-025
    original_display: Energy technology selection is consistent with multiple drivers; AI alone is not established as the determining cause.
    original_state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    web_source_url:
    - https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary

    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation, storage,
        efficiency, and future pathways.
      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-004
    - content: Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500 MW.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-013
    - content: Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-014
    - content: The U.S. DOE fusion strategy describes a private-sector-led pilot pathway in the 2030s, science and technology gaps, public-private partnerships,
        supply chains, national strategy, capital, and AI-enabled research.
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-018
    - content: Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through 2035,
        and up to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-002
    - content: Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and
        exploration of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-004
    - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Microsoft PPA and a plan to restart the approximately 835 MW Crane Clean Energy Center for a 2028 target,
        subject to regulatory, state, and local approvals.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-006
    - content: Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and Europe
        during 2026–2030; the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.
      source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-012
    - content: Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty
        and uncertainty of commercial fusion.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-013

    - content: Helion announced a Microsoft fusion PPA for a 2028 target and at least 50 MW after ramp-up.

      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf

      pair_id: XY-CS-X-015

  current_content_state:
    current_display: Fusion development predates the current AI boom; the incremental contribution of later AI-era offtake remains unresolved.
    current_verdict: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    verification_state: CORRECTED_WITH_TRACEABLE_EVIDENCE
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: CFS announced a 1.8-billion-dollar Series B in 2021 for SPARC and ARC development, citing fusion research progress, climate goals, and commercialization
        before the current AI boom.
      source_url: https://www.cfs.energy/news-and-media/commonwealth-fusion-systems-closes-1-8-billion-series-b-round/
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-017
    - content: ITER's official overview documents a long-running international fusion research and demonstration pathway originating in 1985, before current
        Data Center demand.
      source_url: https://www.iter.org/
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-020
    - content: Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty
        and uncertainty of commercial fusion.

      pair_id: XY-CS-X-013
    - content: Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.

      pair_id: XY-CS-X-015

      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-018
    - content: Google announced that a 50 MW Hermes 2 project is intended to supply the TVA grid by 2030 and that Google will obtain clean-energy attributes
        through TVA for Data Centers in Tennessee and Alabama.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-first-advanced-nuclear-reactor-project-with-kairos-power-and-tennessee-valley-authority/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-003
    - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Microsoft PPA and a plan to restart the approximately 835 MW Crane Clean Energy Center for a 2028 target,
        subject to regulatory, state, and local approvals.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html

    result_unit_id: RESULT-XY-FC-039
    originating_function_cell_id: XY-FC-039
    original_display: Existing non-fusion procurement partially supports the no-fusion counterfactual, subject to regional sufficiency and cost limits.
    original_state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    web_source_url:
    - https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
    - https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
    - https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
    - https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2025/constellation-meta-sign-20-year-deal-for-clean-reliable-nuclear-energy-in-illinois.html
    - https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
  instance_lineage:
    collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
    function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.xy
    result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
    function_2_reviewed_by_instances:
    - gpt.xy
  review_positions:
    XY:
    - review_unit_id: RXY-U-039
      displayed_content:
        statement: Existing non-fusion procurement partially supports the no-fusion counterfactual, subject to regional sufficiency and cost limits.
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
        source_supported_display: PARTIAL
      result_position:
        surface: Result.XY
        cell_id: XY-FC-039
        section: Function Cells and corresponding Result Cell
    XZ: OUTSIDE_THIS_REVIEW_SEAT_SCOPE
    YZ: OUTSIDE_THIS_REVIEW_SEAT_SCOPE
  deviation_history:
    deviation_ids:
    - RXY-DEV-005
  correction_history:
    applied_correction_ids:
    - RXY-COR-005
    proposed_not_applied_correction_ids: []
    review_conflict_correction_ids: []
  current_content_state:
    current_display: Existing non-fusion procurement partially supports the no-fusion counterfactual, subject to regional sufficiency and cost limits.
    current_verdict: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    verification_state: CORRECTED_WITH_TRACEABLE_EVIDENCE
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation, storage,
        efficiency, and future pathways.
      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-004
    - content: Constellation's announcement connects a 20-year Microsoft PPA with the planned restart of the approximately 835 MW Crane plant for a 2028
        target.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-012
    - content: Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500 MW.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-013
    - content: Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-014
    - content: Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through 2035,
        and up to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-002
    - content: Amazon announced a Washington SMR development agreement for about 320 MW initially with an option up to 960 MW, an X-energy investment, and
        exploration of at least 300 MW at North Anna; the announcement refers to growing business and customer energy needs.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-004
    - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Microsoft PPA and a plan to restart the approximately 835 MW Crane Clean Energy Center for a 2028 target,
        subject to regulatory, state, and local approvals.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-006
    - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Meta PPA for 1,121 MW of existing nuclear generation beginning in June 2027 and a planned roughly 30 MW
        uprate.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2025/constellation-meta-sign-20-year-deal-for-clean-reliable-nuclear-energy-in-illinois.html
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-008
    - content: Brookfield and Microsoft announced a framework to deliver more than 10.5 GW of new renewable power capacity in the United States and Europe
        during 2026–2030; the announcement states that cloud and AI adoption increase electricity demand.
      source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-012
    applied_overlays:
    - correction_id: RXY-COR-005
      field: cross_input_support_state
      value: PARTIAL
  unresolved:
    unresolved_items: []
    open_future: true
- cell_id: RD-RESULT-XY-FC-040
  baseline:
    result_unit_id: RESULT-XY-FC-040
    originating_function_cell_id: XY-FC-040
    original_display: The effect of removing water or grid constraints on site and technology choice is not verified.
    original_state: UNKNOWN
    web_source_url:
    - https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
    - https://eta.lbl.gov/publications/speed-power-solutions-accelerating
    - https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
    - https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
  instance_lineage:
    collected_by_instance: NOT_PRESENT_IN_RESULT
    function_1_processed_by_instance: gpt.xy
    result_displayed_by_instance: gpt.xyz
    function_2_reviewed_by_instances:
    - gpt.xy
  review_positions:
    XY:
    - review_unit_id: RXY-U-040
      displayed_content:
        statement: The effect of removing water or grid constraints on site and technology choice is not verified.
        state: UNKNOWN
        source_supported_display: false
      result_position:
        surface: Result.XY
        cell_id: XY-FC-040
        section: Function Cells and corresponding Result Cell
    XZ: OUTSIDE_THIS_REVIEW_SEAT_SCOPE
    YZ: OUTSIDE_THIS_REVIEW_SEAT_SCOPE
  deviation_history:
    deviation_ids:
    - RXY-DEV-005
  correction_history:
    applied_correction_ids:
    - RXY-COR-005
    proposed_not_applied_correction_ids: []
    review_conflict_correction_ids: []
  current_content_state:
    current_display: The effect of removing water or grid constraints on site and technology choice is not verified.
    current_verdict: UNKNOWN
    verification_state: CORRECTED_WITH_TRACEABLE_EVIDENCE
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: The Virginia legislative study discusses Data Center electricity, water, cooling, siting, regulation, local concentration, disclosure gaps,
        reclaimed water, and design-dependent water-energy trade-offs.
      source_url: https://jlarc.virginia.gov/pdfs/reports/Rpt598.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-011
    - content: LBNL identifies large-load connection bottlenecks and more than forty solution candidates across five functional areas.
      source_url: https://eta.lbl.gov/publications/speed-power-solutions-accelerating
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-006
    - content: Louisiana Economic Development announced an AI-optimized Meta Data Center in Richland Parish with an initial investment of about 10 billion
        dollars, about 4 million square feet, and about 2,250 acres.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-010
    - content: Louisiana Economic Development later announced that Meta Hyperion had expanded to more than 50 billion dollars, nearly 10 million square
        feet, and 5 GW of IT capacity, and described it as Meta's largest AI training cluster.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-011
    applied_overlays:
    - correction_id: RXY-COR-005
      field: cross_input_support_state
      value: NOT_ESTABLISHED
  unresolved:
    unresolved_items: []
    open_future: true

    current_verdict: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    verification_state: CORRECTED_WITH_TRACEABLE_EVIDENCE
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: The IEA discusses global Data Center and AI-focused electricity demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, capital, PPAs, on-site generation, storage,
        efficiency, and future pathways.
      source_url: https://www.iea.org/reports/key-questions-on-energy-and-ai/executive-summary
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-004
    - content: PJM's working material distinguishes firm and non-firm requests and applies assumptions for ramp time, utilization, and national constraints
        when converting requests into forecast contributions.
      source_url: https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-010
    - content: LBNL identifies large-load connection bottlenecks and more than forty solution candidates across five functional areas.
      source_url: https://eta.lbl.gov/publications/speed-power-solutions-accelerating
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-006
    - content: FERC rejected the proposed amendment that would have increased the Susquehanna co-located load boundary from 300 MW to 480 MW; the order
        discusses deliverability violations and additional upgrades above the baseline.
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-005
    - content: Louisiana Economic Development announced an AI-optimized Meta Data Center in Richland Parish with an initial investment of about 10 billion
        dollars, about 4 million square feet, and about 2,250 acres.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-010
    - content: Louisiana Economic Development later announced that Meta Hyperion had expanded to more than 50 billion dollars, nearly 10 million square
        feet, and 5 GW of IT capacity, and described it as Meta's largest AI training cluster.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-011

      value: PARTIAL

  baseline:

    originating_function_cell_id: XY-FC-043
    original_display: Project lifecycle states must remain separate; no earlier state proves a later state.
    original_state: VERIFIED_RELATION
    web_source_url:
    - https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf
    - https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
    - https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
    - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    - https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf

    current_display: Project lifecycle states must remain separate; no earlier state proves a later state.
    current_verdict: VERIFIED_RELATION
    verification_state: CORRECTED_WITH_TRACEABLE_EVIDENCE
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - content: PJM's working material distinguishes firm and non-firm requests and applies assumptions for ramp time, utilization, and national constraints
        when converting requests into forecast contributions.
      source_url: https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/committees-groups/subcommittees/las/2025/20251124/20251124-item-03---large-load-adjustment-requests-summary.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-010
    - content: Constellation's announcement connects a 20-year Microsoft PPA with the planned restart of the approximately 835 MW Crane plant for a 2028
        target.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-012
    - content: Google's announcement connects AI-related future power needs, 24/7 carbon-free goals, and a multi-reactor Kairos agreement of up to 500 MW.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-013
    - content: Amazon's announcement links SMR agreements and investment with growing business and customer energy needs and decarbonization goals.
      source_url: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/sustainability/amazon-nuclear-small-modular-reactor-net-carbon-zero
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-014
    - content: Helion announced a Microsoft fusion PPA for a 2028 target and at least 50 MW after ramp-up.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-015
    - content: CFS announced a Google 200 MW ARC PPA, an early-2030s target, and additional investment.
      source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-016
    - content: The U.S. DOE fusion strategy describes a private-sector-led pilot pathway in the 2030s, science and technology gaps, public-private partnerships,
        supply chains, national strategy, capital, and AI-enabled research.
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/fusion-energy-strategy-2024.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-Y-018
    - content: Google announced a multi-reactor Kairos Power purchase agreement, first deployment targeted for 2030, additional deployments through 2035,
        and up to 500 MW supplied to U.S. grids; the announcement directly mentions new power needs to support AI.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-kairos-power-nuclear-energy-agreement/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-002
    - content: FERC rejected the proposed amendment that would have increased the Susquehanna co-located load boundary from 300 MW to 480 MW; the order
        discusses deliverability violations and additional upgrades above the baseline.
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-005
    - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Microsoft PPA and a plan to restart the approximately 835 MW Crane Clean Energy Center for a 2028 target,
        subject to regulatory, state, and local approvals.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-006
    - content: The NRC status page records that the reactor permanently ceased operation in 2019 and that restart-related licensing actions and facility
        restoration remain under review.
      source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/info-finder/reactors/ccec
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-007
    - content: Constellation announced a 20-year Meta PPA for 1,121 MW of existing nuclear generation beginning in June 2027 and a planned roughly 30 MW
        uprate.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2025/constellation-meta-sign-20-year-deal-for-clean-reliable-nuclear-energy-in-illinois.html
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-008
    - content: The NRC records Clinton Unit 1 as operating and records a license-renewal decision dated 2025-12-16.
      source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/reactors/operating/licensing/renewal/applications/clinton
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-009
    - content: Google announced an agreement to purchase 200 MW from a future CFS ARC plant and an additional investment, while expressly noting the difficulty
        and uncertainty of commercial fusion.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-013
    - content: Helion announced a Microsoft PPA targeting electricity supply in 2028 and at least 50 MW after a one-year ramp-up.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-015
    - content: Helion announced that initial earthwork and facility construction had begun at the Malaga site and repeated the plan to provide at least
        50 MW to Microsoft.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-016
    - content: Helion announced receipt of a conditional-use permit and advancement to the next construction phase, while repeating the Microsoft PPA and
        2028 target.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
      pair_id: XY-CS-X-017
    applied_overlays:
    - correction_id: RXY-COR-005
      field: cross_input_support_state
      value: FULL
  unresolved:
    unresolved_items: []
    open_future: true
- cell_id: RD-RESULT-XZ-FC-001
  baseline:
    result_unit_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-001

    original_display: Google–Kairos 사례는 actor·contract·technology 구조에 배치 가능하지만 AI 원인성과 운영성과는 OPEN_FUTURE다.

      content: Google은 Kairos의 복수 SMR에서 전력을 구매하는 계약을 발표했고, 첫 배치를 2030년, 추가 배치를 2035년까지 목표로 하며 총 최대 500 MW를 미국 전력망에 공급한다고 명시함. AI 기술을 지원할 신규 전력 필요를 직접 언급함.

      content: 기존 공동입지 부하 300 MW를 480 MW로 늘리기 위한 개정 ISA 제안을 FERC가 거부함. 480 MW 초과 시 Generation Deliverability Violations와 추가 Upgrade 필요성이 문서에 제시됨.

      content: Microsoft와 20년 PPA를 체결하고 약 835 MW 원전을 재가동하여 PJM 지역 Microsoft Data Center 전력사용을 상쇄하는 계획을 발표함. 목표운전시점은 2028년이며 규제·주·지방 승인이 필요하다고 명시함.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-006
      content: 원자로는 2019-09-26 영구운전정지 후 재가동 가능성이 검토되고 있으며, 재가동에는 NRC 승인과 설비 복구·Upgrade가 필요하고 복수 Licensing Action이 심사 중임.
      source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/info-finder/reactors/ccec
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-021
      content: 'CD-0 through CD-4 and Closeout; boundary: DOE capital asset governance; technology TRL과 다름; linked models: ZM-SG-001, ZM-PR-001'
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/prod/files/PARS_II_SOP_Version_1.1_2011_08_11.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-022
      content: 'Technical reviews, entrance/exit criteria, KDP; boundary: NASA program/project context; Fusion에는 Analogical; linked models: ZM-SG-002, ZM-PR-001'
      source_url: https://www.nasa.gov/reference/3-0-nasa-program-project-life-cycle/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-024

    current_display: Hyperion 5 GW는 IT capacity로만 보존되며 grid demand 또는 승인 interconnection과 동일하지 않다.
    current_verdict: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    verification_state: BASELINE_PRESERVED_NO_DEVIATION
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-009
      content: Meta의 AI-optimized Data Center를 Richland Parish에 선정했으며 초기 발표는 약 100억 달러, 약 400만 ft², 약 2,250 acre의 Site 규모를 제시함. Entergy와 전력계획을 협의하고 전력사용을
        100% Clean/Renewable Energy로 Match한다는 목표를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
      content: 투자규모를 500억 달러 이상, 건물면적을 약 1,000만 ft², IT capacity를 5 GW로 확대했다고 발표하고 Hyperion을 Meta 최대 AI Training Cluster로 직접 귀속함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
      content: 'PUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Standard 전문 세부는 라이선스 경계; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/30134-2

    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004

      content: 2026~2030년에 미국과 유럽에서 10.5 GW를 초과하는 신규 재생에너지 용량을 제공하기 위한 Framework Agreement를 발표함. 발표문은 Cloud와 AI 도입이 전력수요를 증가시킨다고 직접 언급함.
      source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power

    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
      content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
      content: CFS는 Google과 200 MW PPA를 체결했고 Chesterfield County의 첫 ARC가 2030년대 초 Grid 공급을 목표로 한다고 발표함.
      source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
      content: 'Fusion gain·power-plant boundary 용어 교차확인; boundary: 개별 설계의 Net output을 보증하지 않음; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-003, ZM-TO-001'

      content: Microsoft에 2028년 목표로 전력을 공급하고 1년 Ramp-up 후 최소 50 MW를 제공하는 PPA를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
      content: Malaga Site에서 초기 Earthwork와 발전소 건설을 시작했다고 발표하고 Microsoft에 최소 50 MW를 공급할 계획을 반복함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
      content: Conditional Use Permit를 받고 다음 건설단계로 진행한다고 발표함. Microsoft PPA와 2028년 목표를 재확인함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant

    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
      content: 2025년에 12 GW를 초과하는 Net-new Clean Energy 계약을 체결했다고 보고함. 해당 수치는 PPA·Storage·Energy Attributes를 포함하고 실제 발전량은 달라질 수 있다고 각주로 경계를 명시함. 2025년 Freshwater
        Consumption의 약 78%에 해당하는 77억 gallon을 Replenish했다고 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004

    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
      content: Current Page는 AWS Global Data Center WUE를 0.12 L/kWh로 제시하고 24개 Data Center에서 Recycled Water를 사용하며 2030년까지 미국 120개 이상 Location으로 확대할 계획이라고
        명시함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
      content: 2024 AWS Global WUE를 0.15 L/kWh로 보고하고 2021 0.25, 2022 0.19, 2023 0.18, 2024 0.15의 시계열을 제시함. North America에서 냉각용 물수요 946 million liters 감소와
        AI Workload용 Integrated Liquid Cooling 설계를 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
      content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'

  current_content_state:
    current_display: Data Center energy models의 coverage는 있으나 현재 X Data만으로 site-level Fit은 시험할 수 없다.
    current_verdict: OPEN_FUTURE
    verification_state: BASELINE_PRESERVED_NO_DEVIATION
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-002
      content: Kairos–TVA PPA에 따라 Hermes 2의 50 MW가 TVA Grid에 공급될 예정이며 Google은 TVA를 통해 Tennessee Montgomery County와 Alabama Jackson County Data Center 수요에
        대응하는 Clean Energy Attributes를 조달한다고 발표함. 목표시점은 2030년임.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/google-first-advanced-nuclear-reactor-project-with-kairos-power-and-tennessee-valley-authority/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
      content: 기존 공동입지 부하 300 MW를 480 MW로 늘리기 위한 개정 ISA 제안을 FERC가 거부함. 480 MW 초과 시 Generation Deliverability Violations와 추가 Upgrade 필요성이 문서에 제시됨.
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-005
      content: Microsoft와 20년 PPA를 체결하고 약 835 MW 원전을 재가동하여 PJM 지역 Microsoft Data Center 전력사용을 상쇄하는 계획을 발표함. 목표운전시점은 2028년이며 규제·주·지방 승인이 필요하다고 명시함.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2024/Constellation-to-Launch-Crane-Clean-Energy-Center-Restoring-Jobs-and-Carbon-Free-Power-to-The-Grid.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-007
      content: Meta와 20년 PPA를 발표했으며 계약대상은 1,121 MW의 배출없는 원자력 에너지이고 시작시점은 2027년 6월로 제시됨. 약 30 MW Uprate와 장기운영 지원도 발표됨.
      source_url: https://www.constellationenergy.com/news/2025/constellation-meta-sign-20-year-deal-for-clean-reliable-nuclear-energy-in-illinois.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
      content: 투자규모를 500억 달러 이상, 건물면적을 약 1,000만 ft², IT capacity를 5 GW로 확대했다고 발표하고 Hyperion을 Meta 최대 AI Training Cluster로 직접 귀속함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-011
      content: 2026~2030년에 미국과 유럽에서 10.5 GW를 초과하는 신규 재생에너지 용량을 제공하기 위한 Framework Agreement를 발표함. 발표문은 Cloud와 AI 도입이 전력수요를 증가시킨다고 직접 언급함.
      source_url: https://bep.brookfield.com/press-releases/bep/brookfield-and-microsoft-collaborating-deliver-over-105-gw-new-renewable-power
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-002
      content: 'PUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Standard 전문 세부는 라이선스 경계; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/30134-2
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-003
      content: 'IT·air·cooling·electrical·heat recovery·metering; boundary: 설계지침; 개별 Site 실측치 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-001, ZM-EN-002'
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/sites/default/files/2024-07/best-practice-guide-data-center-design_0.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
      content: 'Bottom-up IT, PUE/WUE, cooling, grid carbon/water intensity; boundary: 미국 aggregate estimate·scenario; 개별 Site 인과증거 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-002,
        ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://eta-publications.lbl.gov/sites/default/files/2024-12/lbnl-2024-united-states-data-center-energy-usage-report_1.pdf
    applied_overlays: []

    current_display: 현재 Fusion 계약 MW는 Z의 gain·gross/net 모델에 직접 대입할 수 없는 category다.
    current_verdict: OPEN_FUTURE
    verification_state: BASELINE_PRESERVED_NO_DEVIATION
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
      content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
      content: CFS는 Google과 200 MW PPA를 체결했고 Chesterfield County의 첫 ARC가 2030년대 초 Grid 공급을 목표로 한다고 발표함.
      source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
      content: Microsoft에 2028년 목표로 전력을 공급하고 1년 Ramp-up 후 최소 50 MW를 제공하는 PPA를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
      content: Malaga Site에서 초기 Earthwork와 발전소 건설을 시작했다고 발표하고 Microsoft에 최소 50 MW를 공급할 계획을 반복함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
      content: Conditional Use Permit를 받고 다음 건설단계로 진행한다고 발표함. Microsoft PPA와 2028년 목표를 재확인함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-009
      content: 'Fusion gain·power-plant boundary 용어 교차확인; boundary: 개별 설계의 Net output을 보증하지 않음; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-003, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/MTCD/Publications/PDF/FusionOutlook2023_web.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-010
      content: 'Qeng 식, electrical produced/consumed, recirculating power; boundary: 특정 자기밀폐 개념·가정; 보편 Fusion 식 아님; linked models: ZM-FU-001, ZM-FU-002,
        ZM-FU-003'
      source_url: https://www-pub.iaea.org/mtcd/meetings/PDFplus/2010/cn180/cn180_papers/ftp_2-2.pdf

      displayed_content:
        statement: Energy–Water–Compute 관계는 구조적으로 설명되지만 site impact 평가는 추가 empirical data가 필요하다.
        state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
      result_position:
        surface: Result.XZ
        cell_id: XZ-FC-018
        organized_result_cell_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-018
        section:
        - '5.4'
        - '8'
    YZ: OUTSIDE_THIS_REVIEW_SEAT_SCOPE
  deviation_history:
    deviation_ids: []
  correction_history:
    applied_correction_ids: []
    proposed_not_applied_correction_ids: []
    review_conflict_correction_ids: []
  current_content_state:
    current_display: Energy–Water–Compute 관계는 구조적으로 설명되지만 site impact 평가는 추가 empirical data가 필요하다.
    current_verdict: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    verification_state: BASELINE_PRESERVED_NO_DEVIATION
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-017
      content: 2025년에 12 GW를 초과하는 Net-new Clean Energy 계약을 체결했다고 보고함. 해당 수치는 PPA·Storage·Energy Attributes를 포함하고 실제 발전량은 달라질 수 있다고 각주로 경계를 명시함. 2025년 Freshwater
        Consumption의 약 78%에 해당하는 77억 gallon을 Replenish했다고 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.google/google-2026-environmental-report/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-018
      content: 2021년 Global Data Center Fleet가 43억 gallon을 소비했고 평균 Google Data Center가 일일 약 450,000 gallon을 소비한다고 보고함. 일부 Campus에서 Reclaimed/Non-potable
        Water를 사용하며 Douglas County Georgia에서는 Municipal Wastewater를 재활용한다고 설명함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-commitment-to-climate-conscious-data-center-cooling/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-019
      content: Current Page는 AWS Global Data Center WUE를 0.12 L/kWh로 제시하고 24개 Data Center에서 Recycled Water를 사용하며 2030년까지 미국 120개 이상 Location으로 확대할 계획이라고
        명시함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/natural-resources/water
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-020
      content: 2024 AWS Global WUE를 0.15 L/kWh로 보고하고 2021 0.25, 2022 0.19, 2023 0.18, 2024 0.15의 시계열을 제시함. North America에서 냉각용 물수요 946 million liters 감소와
        AI Workload용 Integrated Liquid Cooling 설계를 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/2024-amazon-sustainability-report.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-021
      content: AWS는 Virginia의 Direct Operations에서 2025년 263,169,407 gallons(996,204,576 liters)을 Withdrawal했다고 보고함.
      source_url: https://sustainability.aboutamazon.com/aws-sustainability-fact-sheets/aws-fact-sheet-virginia.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-004
      content: 'Bottom-up IT, PUE/WUE, cooling, grid carbon/water intensity; boundary: 미국 aggregate estimate·scenario; 개별 Site 인과증거 아님; linked models: ZM-EN-002,
        ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://eta-publications.lbl.gov/sites/default/files/2024-12/lbnl-2024-united-states-data-center-energy-usage-report_1.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-005
      content: 'WUE definition·measurement categories; boundary: Use-phase KPI; 공급망 전체 물발자국과 동일하지 않음; linked models: ZM-WA-001, ZM-WA-002, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/77692.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-006
      content: 'WUE 식·직접/Source water 논의 보조; boundary: 국제표준과 판본·범위 확인 필요; linked models: ZM-WA-001'
      source_url: https://www.thegreengrid.org/system/files/store/WUE_v1.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-007
      content: 'Withdrawal·consumptive use·return flow 구분; boundary: Data center 전용 Model 아님; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003, ZM-TO-001'
      source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-terminology
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-008
      content: 'Withdrawal와 consumption accounting; boundary: 미국 물 사용 분류·자료경계; linked models: ZM-WA-002, ZM-WA-003'
      source_url: https://www.usgs.gov/mission-areas/water-resources/science/water-use-united-states
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-025
      content: 'Cooling-water efficiency·metering·operations; boundary: 연방시설 지침; 모든 기후·기술의 최적해 아님; linked models: NO_MODEL_LINK_DECLARED_IN_INPUT'
      source_url: https://www.energy.gov/cmei/femp/cooling-water-efficiency-opportunities-federal-data-centers
    applied_overlays: []
  unresolved:
    unresolved_items:
    - XZ-OF-001
    - XZ-OF-004
    - XZ-OF-005
    - XZ-OF-010
    open_future: true
- cell_id: RD-RESULT-XZ-FC-019
  baseline:
    result_unit_id: RESULT-XZ-FC-019
    originating_function_cell_id: XZ-FC-019
    original_display: 현재 입력은 위험층의 coverage를 제공하지만 통합 정량위험 또는 성공확률은 제공하지 않는다.
    original_state: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    web_source_url:
    - https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
    - https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
    - https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
    - https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    - https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
    - https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant

    - https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration

  instance_lineage:

  deviation_history:
    deviation_ids: []
  correction_history:
    applied_correction_ids: []
    proposed_not_applied_correction_ids: []
    review_conflict_correction_ids: []
  current_content_state:
    current_display: 현재 입력은 위험층의 coverage를 제공하지만 통합 정량위험 또는 성공확률은 제공하지 않는다.
    current_verdict: SUPPORTED_WITH_CONDITIONS
    verification_state: BASELINE_PRESERVED_NO_DEVIATION
    preserved_content_and_sources:
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-004
      content: 기존 공동입지 부하 300 MW를 480 MW로 늘리기 위한 개정 ISA 제안을 FERC가 거부함. 480 MW 초과 시 Generation Deliverability Violations와 추가 Upgrade 필요성이 문서에 제시됨.
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2024-11/20241101-3061_ER24-2172-000.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-009
      content: Meta의 AI-optimized Data Center를 Richland Parish에 선정했으며 초기 발표는 약 100억 달러, 약 400만 ft², 약 2,250 acre의 Site 규모를 제시함. Entergy와 전력계획을 협의하고 전력사용을
        100% Clean/Renewable Energy로 Match한다는 목표를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-selects-northeast-louisiana-as-site-of-10-billion-artificial-intelligence-optimized-data-center-governor-jeff-landry-calls-investment-a-new-chapter-for-state
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-010
      content: 투자규모를 500억 달러 이상, 건물면적을 약 1,000만 ft², IT capacity를 5 GW로 확대했다고 발표하고 Hyperion을 Meta 최대 AI Training Cluster로 직접 귀속함.
      source_url: https://www.opportunitylouisiana.gov/news/meta-commits-more-than-50-billion-for-north-louisiana-project-becoming-one-of-the-largest-data-centers-in-history
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-012
      content: Google은 CFS의 첫 상업 ARC 발전소에서 200 MW를 구매하는 계약과 추가투자를 발표함. 동시에 Fusion 상용화가 매우 어렵고 성공이 보장되지 않는다는 한계를 직접 명시함.
      source_url: https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/our-latest-bet-on-a-fusion-powered-future/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-013
      content: CFS는 Google과 200 MW PPA를 체결했고 Chesterfield County의 첫 ARC가 2030년대 초 Grid 공급을 목표로 한다고 발표함.
      source_url: https://cfs.energy/news-and-media/google-and-commonwealth-fusion-systems-sign-strategic-partnership/
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-014
      content: Microsoft에 2028년 목표로 전력을 공급하고 1년 Ramp-up 후 최소 50 MW를 제공하는 PPA를 발표함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-announces-worlds-first-fusion-ppa-with-microsoft
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-015
      content: Malaga Site에서 초기 Earthwork와 발전소 건설을 시작했다고 발표하고 Microsoft에 최소 50 MW를 공급할 계획을 반복함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/blog/starting-to-build-the-worlds-first-fusion-power-plant-in-malaga-wa
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-X-SRC-016
      content: Conditional Use Permit를 받고 다음 건설단계로 진행한다고 발표함. Microsoft PPA와 2028년 목표를 재확인함.
      source_url: https://www.helionenergy.com/newsroom/helion-receives-approvals-for-next-phase-of-construction-of-worlds-first-commercial-fusion-power-plant
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-017
      content: 'Risk principles·framework·process; boundary: 인증표준·단일 정량 Model이 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-001, ZM-PR-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.iso.org/standard/65694.html
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-018
      content: '대규모 Data Center load·BPS·backup transfer risk; boundary: 북미 BPS 중심; 개별 계통연계 study를 대체하지 않음; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.nerc.com/globalassets/who-we-are/standing-committees/rstc/3_doc_white-paper-characteristics-and-risks-of-emerging-large-loads.pdf
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-019
      content: 'Large load study·tariff·co-location policy layer; boundary: 미국 연방관할·진행 중 절차; 보편 Grid rule 아님; linked models: ZM-RI-002, ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/news/ferc-launches-aggressive-targeted-action-speed-large-load-integration
    - pair_id: XZ-CSP-Z-S-024
      content: 'Emerging U.S. Fusion licensing·oversight actor; boundary: 미국 관할; 설계·연료·Site별 적용은 별도; linked models: ZM-TO-001, ZM-RI-003'
      source_url: https://www.nrc.gov/materials/fusion/vision-strategy
    applied_overlays: []
  unresolved:
    unresolved_items:
    - XZ-OF-001
    - XZ-OF-002
    - XZ-OF-003
    - XZ-OF-004
    - XZ-OF-006
    - XZ-OF-007

    - XZ-OF-009
    - XZ-OF-010
    open_future: true
